primary_pair: Tannisho, sections 1, 6, 10, and 11, https://www.bdk.or.jp/document/dgtl-dl/dBET_Tannisho-Ofumi_1996.pdf
SN 22.59 Anattalakkhana Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html
Dogen Bendowa and shusho itto, Soto Zen source, https://global.sotozen-net.or.jp/eng/library/key_terms/pdf/key_terms07.pdf
Bhagavad Gita 18.14 and 18.66, https://www.bhagavad-gita.us/bhagavad-gita-18-14/ and https://www.holy-bhagavad-gita.org/chapter/18/verse/66/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can become self-confirming if entry grammar, residue authorization, warning, and verification are coded from the same passage. It can also distort traditions that reject agency accounting by forcing them into an analyst's support and remainder vocabulary.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: This audit checked accessible primary translations, local prior Lumenary audits, and open sources on conversion, rites of passage, doctrine-as-grammar, religious coping, situated learning, Pure Land Other Power, Christian grace, and practice-realization. It did not fully review Rambo's full monograph, Lindbeck's full book, Japanese, Pali, Sanskrit, Tibetan, Latin, or Chinese originals, Shinran scholarship, Dogen scholarship, Sufi bayah and fana sources, Dzogchen pointing-out manuals, or practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts support an interaction field but also reduce originality. Tannisho makes entry depend on entrusting to Amida's vow, relocates decisive efficacy to Other Power, and warns against self-power, teacher ownership, and self-will. SN 22.59 negates ownership of the five aggregates and moves through disenchantment, release, and knowledge of release, without authorizing a hidden self as remainder. Dogen strains the sequence because practice and realization are one, so beginning and fruit cannot be cleanly separated. The Gita complicates the model by mixing action, multiple causes, divine inner rulership, and final surrender, so one text may contain several entry-residue logics by chapter and voice.

title: Entry-Residue Architecture
unlike_statement: Unlike Rambo, Van Gennep, Turner, Lindbeck, Pargament, Lave and Wenger, VCE, Shinran, Dogen, Orange, and prior Lumenary ledgers, this idea says the key test is additive prediction: independently coded residue authorization and entry grammar should interact to predict held-out safeguards, warnings, effort theories, verification rules, and repairs better than entry-only, residue-only, agency-style, social-ecology, tradition-identity, or source-layer baselines.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Inherited religious formation and Dogen-style practice-realization.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: This lowers confidence from candidate-discovery range to extended range. The model remains useful as a coding heuristic, but anomaly handling must be proven through blind coding before it can carry public claim weight.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: In inherited formation, there may be no discrete threshold act, no single first break, and no separate residue policy available to the beginner. In Dogen-style practice-realization, beginning and realization are not cleanly separated, so the entry grammar may be the same as the fruition grammar. These cases force the model to include no-threshold, no-break, continuous-authorization, practice-realization, and analyst-frame-refused values.

claim_units: Spiritual entry should be modeled as a compound grammar rather than a single conversion, initiation, or practice-beginning event.
The grammar has four fields: incapacity diagnosis, minimum participation threshold, break mechanism, and post-negation residue policy.
First-break type is conditional, not universal.
First-break becomes irreducible only when a tradition denies that ordinary self-generated threshold acts can found the path.
The model should predict warnings, verification rules, and repair instructions through split-source coding.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Psychotherapy, recovery, and education entry into identity-changing practice
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Methods that deny the learner's old self-model as competent should need stronger scaffolded authorization and clearer residue rules than methods that allow peripheral participation from the start. Exposure therapy, addiction recovery, and apprenticeship learning should differ predictably in what counts as real entry and what kind of self-claim is treated as relapse, resistance, dependency, or premature mastery.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Replace spiritual incapacity with a learner's blocked agency model, minimum participation with legitimate first participation, break mechanism with external authorization or scaffold, and residue policy with what forms of self-trust remain valid after the old identity is challenged.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If entry failures and repairs in these domains are predicted equally well by motivation, alliance, skill difficulty, access, social support, and risk factors, with no added value from threshold plus residue coding, the structure does not travel.

exact_claim: A tradition's account of spiritual entry is best modeled as a compound grammar with four fields: what incapacity blocks ordinary entry, what minimum participation counts as real entry, what break mechanism is required if self-generated threshold entry is denied, and what residue policy governs claims after ordinary agency is negated. First-break type is not universal. It becomes an irreducible variable only in high-severity traditions that explicitly deny that any naturally self-generated threshold act can found the path.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Entry texts coded as grace-held, vow-held, or teacher-recognition entry should predict held-out warning texts targeting pride, self-effort absolutism, unauthorized claim-making, despair, passivity, or premature certainty.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: High-severity traditions that deny self-generated threshold entry should show distinctive warnings against self-credit or self-powered attainment.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source coding across Orange and Augustinian grace texts, Tannisho and Shinran letters, Dzogchen or Mahamudra pointing-out manuals, and matched Theravada or Confucian cultivation texts.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If held-out manuals from these traditions warn no more against self-credit than matched traditions with ordinary participation thresholds, the first-break variable loses predictive force.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Legitimate-peripheral or inherited-participation traditions should repair failure by restoring role, community, ritual, repetition, apprenticeship, or teacher relationship, while high-severity break traditions should repair failure by reorienting trust, grace, vow, recognition, or authorization.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Minimum participation threshold should predict beginner repair instructions independently of broad tradition label.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind coding of entry sources, followed by held-out practitioner interviews about failed beginnings and repair instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If repairs cluster mainly by institution, teacher style, social class, clinical risk, or generic conversion stage rather than coded threshold grammar, the model is mostly redundant with social-ecological theories.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Two traditions with similar entry thresholds but different residue policies should show different verification rules and different forbidden claimant warnings.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Residue policy should interact with entry grammar rather than merely duplicate it.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Compare Theravada no-self analysis, Advaita self-inquiry, Pure Land Other Power, Soto practice-realization, and Dzogchen recognition using inter-rater coding and held-out warning manuals.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If residue policy adds no predictive gain beyond entry mechanism, support locus, social ecology, and tradition identity, the compound model should collapse into simpler entry or agency models.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Gradual cultivation, inherited practice, legitimate peripheral participation, and practice-realization cases should be codeable without a first-break field, or should receive a no-break or analyst-frame-refused value.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: First-break should be non-universal.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Initial six-case trial: Theravada sangha entry, Confucian cultivation, Jodo Shinshu, Augustinian grace, Zen great doubt, and Dzogchen pointing-out.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If all cases require first-break accounting, the conditional claim is false. If none do after controls, the first-break field is unnecessary.

Build a pre-registered four-field coding sheet: incapacity diagnosis, minimum participation threshold, break mechanism, residue policy, evidence passage, source layer, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.
Use split-source blind coding. Code entry and residue from one corpus, then predict held-out warnings, safeguards, verification rules, and repairs from separate manuals or practitioner interviews.

Test six initial cases: Theravada sangha entry, Confucian cultivation, Jodo Shinshu, Augustinian grace, Zen great doubt, and Dzogchen pointing-out.
Require inter-rater reliability before using the rubric publicly.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-beginning cases and repair instructions, not agreement with the model.

Do not raise above extended unless the four-field model predicts held-out warnings, safeguards, verification, or repairs better than entry-only, residue-only, agency-style, social-ecology, clinical-risk, conversion-stage, and tradition-identity baselines.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.82 to about 0.54. The four-field compression is useful, but most components have strong near-neighbors in prior Lumenary audits, conversion theory, rites-of-passage theory, doctrine-as-grammar, religious problem-solving styles, legitimate peripheral participation, grace theology, Pure Land Other Power, Dogen practice-realization, VCE factor coding, and Meno-style inquiry paradoxes. The remaining contribution is a conditional first-break rule plus a split-source predictive test, not a discovery-level doctrine candidate.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is already obvious as conversion stages, initiation, grace, Other Power, self-power, upaya, doctrine-as-grammar, socialization, or apprenticeship. They cannot identify cases where the four fields predict warnings or repairs better than tradition identity, teacher experience, institutional context, or clinical risk.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners provide concrete failed-beginning cases where single-factor models mispredict repair, but the interaction of incapacity, participation threshold, break mechanism, and residue policy predicts the actual warning, verification rule, or repair instruction.
questions: Is this four-field grammar more than familiar conversion theory, grace versus works, self-power versus Other Power, upaya, doctrine-as-grammar, and ordinary lineage pedagogy?

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can become circular if incapacity, threshold, break mechanism, residue policy, and predicted safeguards are extracted from the same passage. It also risks forcing traditions with inherited practice, continuous formation, no-threshold participation, or practice-realization into an analyst's entry grid.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit checked accessible primary translations, local prior Lumenary audits, and open sources on conversion, liminality, doctrine-as-grammar, religious coping, legitimate peripheral participation, contemplative adverse effects, grace, Other Power, and practice-realization. It did not fully review Rambo's full monograph, Lindbeck's full book, Japanese, Pali, Sanskrit, Tibetan, Latin, or Chinese originals, Shinran scholarship, Dogen scholarship, Sufi bayah and fana sources, Dzogchen pointing-out manuals, or practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Orange is a near-exact high-severity case: prayer, will, desire, assent, and the beginning of faith are attributed to grace, not unaided nature. Tannisho supplies a vow-held analogue, where entrusting to Amida's Primal Vow displaces self-power and reshapes warning language. SN 22.59 does not fit the same entry grammar, because it negates ownership of aggregates and moves through disenchantment and release without clearly requiring an external break mechanism. Dogen is the strongest anomaly: practice and realization are treated as one, and beginner practice is already implicated in realization, so entry and fruition cannot be cleanly sequenced as threshold and later attainment.

title: Compound Entry Grammar
unlike_statement: Unlike Rambo, Lofland-Stark, Van Gennep, Turner, Lindbeck, Pargament, Lave and Wenger, Orange, Shinran, Dogen, VCE, Meno-style inquiry paradoxes, and prior Lumenary entry-residue records, this idea says entry should be coded through four interacting fields, incapacity, minimum participation, break mechanism, and residue policy, and that first-break type becomes irreducible only where a tradition denies that ordinary self-generated threshold entry can found the path.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: No-threshold practice-realization, inherited religion, and successful dual-practice cases.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: This lowers confidence in the model as a general theory. It can survive only as a coding heuristic with mandatory values for no-threshold, inherited-practice, practice-realization, simultaneous-custody, no-custody-frame, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The candidate assumes a distinguishable beginning where some holder takes custody before the practitioner can authorize the path. Dogen-style practice-realization weakens the before-after sequence because practice and realization are not two separate states. Inherited religion can make beginning indistinguishable from ordinary socialization. Successful dual practice can show multiple support systems coexisting without a single contested custody arrangement.

claim_units: Transformative paths begin before stable practitioner authorization or full understanding is available.
Early attention, trust, agency, and interpretation are held by a support holder, such as grace, vow, teacher, community, ritual, rule, text, institution, or inherited practice.
Traditions encode this support arrangement in an entry grammar.
Some entry grammars are retrospective, naming formation already produced by inheritance, apprenticeship, ritual, or habituation.
Some entry grammars are prescriptive, forbidding self-initiation, self-credit, self-verification, or independent effort while authorizing other support holders.

The beginning of a path is not reducible to first break, social induction, doctrine, or institution alone, but to an interaction between custody assignment, entry grammar, and practical control surface.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Psychotherapy, recovery programs, and professional apprenticeship
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs that explicitly diagnose beginners as unable to self-authorize change should display stronger warnings against self-management, stricter sponsor or therapist verification, more relapse narratives tied to self-will, and sharper repair protocols than programs that treat entry as skill acquisition or gradual social learning.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A beginner in therapy, recovery, or apprenticeship often cannot yet fully authorize the method, assess progress, or stabilize motivation. Custody may be held by therapist, sponsor, cohort, protocol, diagnosis, supervisor, rule, or practice schedule. Some systems retrospectively name a support ecology already underway, while others prescriptively forbid self-management or self-verification and require surrender to an external frame.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Warning and repair profiles are predicted better by symptom severity, legal liability, institutional culture, supervision quality, mentor style, or workload than by entry grammar and custody assignment.

exact_claim: Transformative paths begin by placing unstable attention, trust, agency, and interpretation under custody before the practitioner can fully authorize or understand the path. Traditions then give that custody an entry grammar. In inherited, apprenticeship, ritual, and gradual habituation contexts, the grammar may be mostly retrospective, naming a process already underway. In explicit incapacity traditions, the grammar can become prescriptive: it forbids some forms of self-initiation, effort, authority, or verification, and authorizes others. The beginning of a path is therefore a contested custody arrangement whose doctrine may be either narration or control surface.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders using only entry or doctrinal texts should predict held-out beginner warnings, verification rules, and repair instructions better when custody holder and prescriptive versus retrospective function are added to Rambo-style and Lave-Wenger-style variables.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Prescriptive custody grammar has incremental predictive force after social, institutional, and conversion-process controls.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding across Orange, Tannisho or Ofumi, Benedictine novitiate texts, OCIA, SN 55.5 and related Theravada manuals, one Dzogchen or Mahamudra entry source, and one Sufi or Islamic initiation source.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The added fields do not improve prediction, or all signal is absorbed by institution, teacher authority, socialization, ritual process, clinical risk, or tradition identity.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Grace-held and vow-held cases should warn against self-credit, calculation, unaided assent, self-powered effort, premature assurance, or unauthorized verification more specifically than apprenticeship or socialization cases.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Explicit incapacity traditions should show warnings against the forbidden claimant named by the entry grammar.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Held-out warnings from Christian grace manuals, Shin Buddhist pastoral texts, Pure Land sermons, and teacher interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Warnings are generic beginner warnings, such as laziness, poor ethics, weak motivation, or weak community belonging, and do not track the custody holder after controls.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Practitioners in inherited, ritual, monastic, or apprenticeship contexts should report that routine, community, sponsor, rule, liturgy, or family practice held attention and trust before doctrinal explanation became clear.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Retrospective custody grammar should appear where lived induction precedes explicit doctrinal understanding.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Interviews with cradle practitioners, OCIA participants, Orthodox catechumens, Buddhist refuge students, and monastic novices.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reports show doctrine-first authorization, or repair practices target belief assent more than formation ecology.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Switching failures should cluster around self-verification, surrender, teacher trust, vow misunderstanding, grace versus effort, rule obedience, or ritual belonging rather than only technique mismatch.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Hybrid instability should increase when old and new custody grammars assign agency and verification incompatibly.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Practitioner switching interviews coded against VCE-style practitioner, practice, relationship, interpretation, and health-factor baselines.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Breakdowns are predicted as well or better by intensity, trauma history, community conflict, practice technique, teacher misconduct, or clinical vulnerability.

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: Very high. Custody is a modern analyst term that can flatten grace, vow, obedience, refuge, rule, catechesis, initiation, community socialization, and practice-realization into one psychological metaphor. The model also risks circularity if the same passage is used to infer custody grammar and then to confirm predicted warnings or repairs.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Search and close-reading covered accessible primary texts, local prior Lumenary records, conversion theory, legitimate peripheral participation, doctrine-as-grammar, catechumenate sources, religious coping, ritual learning, and contemplative adverse-experience methodology. It did not fully review Rambo's full monograph, Lindbeck's The Nature of Doctrine, Talal Asad in full, Van Gennep and Turner in full, Japanese Pure Land scholarship, Dogen scholarship, Tibetan pointing-out manuals, Islamic bayah and Sufi tarbiya sources, Sanskrit guru-disciple materials, original-language sources, or practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Orange is the strongest prescriptive incapacity case: faith's beginning, desire, assent, prayer, and right choice are assigned to grace rather than unaided natural power. Tannisho and Ofumi give a vow-held analogue: entrusting is given by Amida's working, nenbutsu after settled faith is gratitude rather than self-powered production, and the warning profile targets calculation and self-power. Benedict gives institutional and apprenticeship custody: the novice is delayed, tested, placed under a senior, repeatedly exposed to the Rule, and only then incorporated. SN 55.5 is a partial anomaly: it names association with people of integrity, hearing true Dhamma, appropriate attention, and practice in accordance with Dhamma. That is distributed support, but not necessarily a doctrine forbidding self-generated beginning. The close-read result is that the candidate's structure exists in several sources, but its categories are analyst abstractions over older grace, vow, rule, apprenticeship, and stream-entry grammars.

title: Prescriptive Custody of Beginnings
unlike_statement: Unlike prior Lumenary entry ledgers, Rambo conversion theory, legitimate peripheral participation, Lindbeck's doctrine-as-grammar, Pargament's agency styles, Orange, Shinran, Benedict, and OCIA, this candidate's only distinct claim is that beginnings should be coded as custody of unstable attention, trust, agency, and interpretation, and that entry doctrine should be classified as either retrospective narration or prescriptive control. That difference is useful but thin, because prior Lumenary records and older sources already contain most of the structure.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Successful dual-trained or hybrid practitioners who switch methods smoothly after clear instruction, plus traditions that refuse the analyst's developmental sequence, especially Soto practice-realization, Dzogchen direct introduction, Pure Land Other Power, inherited practice, and apophatic silence.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers originality confidence from candidate discovery to extended. The model remains promising only if it predicts stage-specific and direction-specific switching failures beyond teacher style, vocabulary, social ecology, practice intensity, and clinical risk.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If practitioners can move from vipassana to Advaita, from self-inquiry to noting, from non-attachment to devotion, or from devotional prayer to deconstructive practice without old attentional habits persisting, then grain may be current ecology and vocabulary rather than embodied residue. If Pure Land or grace-held practice keeps efficacy outside practitioner-owned capacity, residue may not become the practitioner's grain at all. If Soto practice-realization collapses means and fruit, early and mature mismatch may not separate cleanly.

claim_units: Direction in contemplative practice is layered rather than unitary.
Procedure directs the practitioner from the beginning by selecting what to notice, devalue, seek, or refuse.
Residue authorization directs the practitioner by defining what may remain after negation.
Teacher expectations and report norms carry social and linguistic direction.
Repeated residue authorization can become embodied attentional grain.
Early mismatch should show up as confusion about what may be found or claimed.
Mature mismatch should show up as switching costs, attentional resistance, or practice-specific distortions.
The model adds a temporal sequence: procedural direction can operate early, while residue direction may become embodied later.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: CBT-trained clients entering psychodynamic therapy should initially turn free association into problem solving. Somatic-therapy clients entering cognitive restructuring should over-prioritize body signal. IFS-trained clients entering exposure work should over-personify processes. Experienced clinicians switching modalities should show mature switching costs that differ from beginner vocabulary confusion. Explicit re-graining should improve integrative therapy more than simply adding new instructions.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Procedure becomes the method's explicit operations. Residue authorization becomes what remains trusted after critique of the old self-model, such as agency, bodily signal, cognition, parts, relationship, or surrender. Social and linguistic direction becomes supervision, case language, and acceptable progress reports. Grain becomes the automatic trained operation that persists after the person enters a new method.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Switching costs are fully explained by diagnosis, alliance, therapist skill, session dose, client preference, or vocabulary familiarity, and prior-method grain adds no prediction of failure shape or repair.

exact_claim: Contemplative traditions install direction through layered mechanisms: procedural instructions, residue authorization after negation, and social or linguistic report norms. With repetition, authorized residue can become embodied grain. Early mismatch should appear as confusion about what may be found or claimed, while mature mismatch should appear as switching costs, attentional resistance, or specific distortions in practice.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Procedural-direction texts should predict immediate attentional errors, such as tracking the wrong object or applying judgment when suspended. Residue-authorization texts should predict claim-confusion warnings, such as reifying awareness, collapsing into nihilism, self-crediting, or refusing responsibility. Social-report norms should predict acceptable testimony and teacher correction patterns.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Split-source coding of manuals should identify where direction first enters, then predict held-out warnings and repair instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pre-registered corpus coding across MN 10, SN 22.59, Vivekachudamani, Brihadaranyaka, one Dzogchen or Mahamudra manual, one Soto source, one Pure Land source, one Sufi source, and one Christian apophatic source.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Held-out warnings are predicted as well or better by tradition identity, teacher style, institution, practice intensity, social ecology, or generic beginner problems, with no incremental value from direction-layer coding.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Beginners crossing traditions should mostly ask what is allowed to be found, named, trusted, or claimed. Mature practitioners should report automatic attentional pull, such as noting when asked to rest, witness-seeking when asked to deconstruct, affective restraint when asked to surrender, or devotional personalization when asked to bracket relation.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Early and mature mismatch should differ phenomenologically and behaviorally.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Longitudinal micro-phenomenological interviews with beginner, intermediate, and advanced dual-trained practitioners, coded blind to tradition and stage.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Beginners and mature practitioners show the same generic confusion, or mature resistance disappears after one clear explanation of the new method.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Prior training should predict attentional target selection, recovery after distraction, affective valence toward arising phenomena, observer stabilization or dissolution, and response latency when switching methods, even when participants are not invited to use tradition-specific language.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Residue-to-grain conversion should produce nonverbal or low-vocabulary markers that survive report-language controls.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Mixed-method study using interviews, timed practice prompts, experience sampling, teacher-blind coding, and lexical controls.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: All apparent grain signal disappears when report vocabulary, teacher framing, and community identity are controlled.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Early mismatch should cluster around uncertainty, permission, fear of doing the practice wrong, and forbidden claimant confusion. Mature mismatch should cluster around witness reification, nihilistic flattening, devotional rupture, compulsive deconstruction, or inability to stop a trained attentional operation.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Adverse effects should show different profiles for early authorization confusion and mature embodied distortion.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Re-code VCE-style adverse-event interviews and teacher case consultations for prior training, current practice, direction layer, stage, warning, repair, and outcome.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: VCE-style variables such as retreat intensity, sleep disruption, trauma history, psychiatric vulnerability, weak teacher support, or social isolation explain the adverse pattern without residue-to-grain variables.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A model using both residue policy and grain-stage variables should predict switching difficulty and repair better than grain-only, residue-only, practice-technique-only, or social-ecology-only models.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The bridge claim should outperform its parent ideas separately.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater coded dataset of cross-training cases with preregistered comparison models.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The interaction term adds no predictive value, or grain-only and VCE-factor baselines fully absorb the effect.

near_neighbors.difference: The current idea adds residue authorization as one proposed developmental route into grain and distinguishes early procedural mismatch from mature embodied mismatch.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Very high internal reduction. Treat as an extension of Grain, not a new discovery.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close internal neighbor. It already claims that attention, discrimination, trust, longing, self-observation, and integration are trained with directional grain and that cross-training should produce specific resistance or harm patterns.
near_neighbors.source: Local Lumenary prior, The Grain of Capacity, reviews/originality/2026-05-26-the-grain-of-capacity-8ab2c8dda0ae6f7d.json

near_neighbors.difference: The current idea makes residue policy developmental and embodied rather than only comparative and textual.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High internal reduction. The new claim survives only as a bridge from residue coding to longitudinal practice effects.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close internal neighbor for the claim that traditions differ by what they authorize, refuse, test, or leave undecided after negation.
near_neighbors.source: Local Lumenary prior, Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice, reviews/originality/2026-05-26-residue-policy-in-negative-self-practice-d80ea45da8d6d4ca.json

near_neighbors.difference: Foucault does not isolate post-negation residue authorization or predict early versus mature mismatch in contemplative cross-training.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for layered practice direction and self-forming technique.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close structural near-neighbor. Foucault already treats practices, with help from others, as operations on body, soul, thought, conduct, and way of being that transform the subject toward a named ideal.
near_neighbors.source: Michel Foucault, Technologies of the Self, https://foucault.info/documents/foucault.technologiesOfSelf.en//

near_neighbors.difference: Bourdieu and Wacquant do not focus on contemplative negation, residue policy, or soteriological authorization.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Very high reduction for the embodied-grain and switching-cost portions.
near_neighbors.overlap: Near exact for embodied grain: repeated training generates durable cognitive, affective, conative, and bodily dispositions. Hysteresis literature directly anticipates mismatch when old dispositions meet a new field.
near_neighbors.source: Pierre Bourdieu on habitus and Loic Wacquant on primary and secondary habitus, https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/1357034X13501348

near_neighbors.difference: Mahmood studies Islamic piety and ethical subject formation, not cross-tradition contemplative negation or residue-after-negation coding.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the claim that repeated religiously framed action sinks into disposition.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for repeated religious practice cultivating inward dispositions, affects, desires, and a pious self. This is essentially a residue-to-grain mechanism in another vocabulary.
near_neighbors.source: Saba Mahmood, Politics of Piety, and related habitus discussions, overview at https://scholarblogs.emory.edu/moralworlds/2024/10/16/saba-mahmood-the-politics-of-piety/

near_neighbors.difference: Hadot does not formulate a residue policy or split early procedural direction from later embodied residue.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for procedural direction and transformation through repeated practice, but also leaves room for a narrower residue-grain test.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for practices that transform perception, vision of the world, and personality. Hadot also pressures the model because exercises can travel across schools and be re-aimed.
near_neighbors.source: Pierre Hadot, spiritual exercises, overview at https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/14/8/998 and https://pages.charlotte.edu/pact/wp-content/uploads/sites/1333/2023/08/Davidson-SpiritualExercisesAncient-1990.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: This framework classifies attentional regimes, not residue authorization or doctrinal claimant rules.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the idea that procedures produce distinct trained capacities.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close contemplative science near-neighbor. Meditation is already treated as a family of emotional and attentional training regimes developed for different ends, with long-term effects on brain and behavior.
near_neighbors.source: Antoine Lutz, Heleen Slagter, John Dunne, and Richard Davidson, Attention regulation and monitoring in meditation, https://research.vu.nl/en/publications/attention-regulation-and-monitoring-in-meditation/

near_neighbors.difference: The matrix is a phenomenological and neurocognitive heuristic, not a residue-to-grain developmental theory.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction and a strong baseline model for any empirical test.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for decomposing mindfulness into multiple dimensions, including object orientation, dereification, meta-awareness, stance, and practice context, rather than one neutral capacity.
near_neighbors.source: Lutz, Jha, Dunne, and Saron, Investigating the Phenomenological Matrix of Mindfulness-Related Practices, https://www.johnddunne.net/uploads/9/8/5/6/9856107/lutzjhadunne___saron_investigating_the_phenomenological_matrix_of_mindfulness-related_practices_from_a_neurocognitive_perspective_american_psychologist_oct_2015_.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Dunne does not frame the difference as residue authorization becoming embodied grain across traditions.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the non-neutrality of mindfulness and for mismatch between practice styles.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for intra-Buddhist differences in ethics, judgment, memory, present-centered awareness, classical practice, and nondual practice. Dunne also notes that technique and theory tend to cohere.
near_neighbors.source: John D. Dunne, Buddhist Styles of Mindfulness, https://www.johnddunne.net/uploads/9/8/5/6/9856107/dunne_j_mindfulness_heuristic.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: VCE does not claim residue authorization becomes embodied grain or that early and mature mismatch have distinct signatures.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High methodological reduction. Any test must show added predictive value beyond VCE-style factor coding.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close empirical-adjacent neighbor. VCE separates phenomenology, interpretation, response, practice factors, practitioner factors, relationships, and health behaviors, and shows that similar experiences can be appraised and managed differently.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl, Fisher, Cooper, Rosen, and Britton, The Varieties of Contemplative Experience, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: Katz and Sharf focus more on experience construction and rhetoric than on trained capacities becoming resistant habits.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for report-norm and tradition-shaped-experience claims.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for the social and linguistic layer. Experience and reports are shaped by concepts, traditions, historical forms, bare-attention rhetoric, and institutional contexts.
near_neighbors.source: Steven Katz constructivism and Robert Sharf on meditative experience, Sharf abstract at https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/1363461514557561

near_neighbors.difference: The study concerns imaginative prayer and inner sense cultivation, not negation, residue, or cross-tradition switching costs.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to high reduction for practice-specific perceptual training.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close practitioner-facing and empirical near-neighbor. Prayer practice can cultivate inner sensory attention, make inner experience more significant, and intensify spiritual experience.
near_neighbors.source: Tanya Luhrmann and Rachel Morgain, Prayer as Inner Sense Cultivation, https://digitalcollections.anu.edu.au/items/68665181-8c2f-473f-a5f8-e3e570a4e9b1

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine or candidate discovery. Treat as an extension of The Grain of Capacity and Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice.
Cross-index with Practice Architecture as Upstream Condition for Remainder Phenomenology, Operational Remainder Ecology, Transfer Profile, Claimability and Support Rubric, and prior entry ledgers.

Build a bounded coding sheet with fields for direction layer, procedural instruction, residue authorization, social or report norm, embodied marker, source passage, stage, warning, repair, failure mode, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.
Use split-source blind coding. Code procedure from instruction passages, residue from doctrinal or negation passages, and warnings or repairs from held-out manuals or practitioner interviews.

Add mandatory anomaly values: no-threshold, practice-realization, direct recognition, radical Other Power, grace-held support, inherited practice, successful dual practice, no-residue report, secular extraction, psychiatric vulnerability, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.
Separate report vocabulary from embodied attentional markers using micro-phenomenological interviews, lexical controls, and behaviorally observable switching tasks.
Run longitudinal and cross-training tests with inter-rater reliability before using public-facing claims.

Compare predictive value against habitus and hysteresis, technologies of the self, spiritual exercises, pious habitus, Asad and Lindbeck, Katz and Sharf, Dunne styles, Lutz phenomenological matrix, VCE factors, social ecology, teacher style, intensity, and clinical-risk baselines.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-switching cases and repair instructions rather than agreement with the framework.

Do not raise novelty above extended unless residue-to-grain interaction predicts stage-specific warnings, switching costs, or repairs better than parent Lumenary ideas and established near-neighbor theories.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.80 to about 0.50. The idea is useful and testable, but its core parts are strongly anticipated by prior Lumenary Grain and Residue records, Foucault's technologies of the self, Hadot's spiritual exercises, Bourdieu and Wacquant on habitus and hysteresis, Mahmood on pious habitus, Lutz and Dunne on meditation styles, the phenomenological matrix, VCE factor coding, Katz and Sharf on constructed or rhetorically framed experience, and Luhrmann's attentional learning. The surviving contribution is the specific temporal bridge from residue authorization to embodied grain, plus early versus mature mismatch predictions.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners and scholars say this is just habitus, spiritual exercises, technologies of the self, mindfulness-style differences, VCE factor coding, constructivism, or familiar lineage pedagogy. They report that switching failures are mostly vocabulary, teacher relationship, social belonging, practice intensity, trauma history, or temperament, not embodied residue.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners provide concrete failed-switching cases where the old training persists after clear re-instruction, where the failure's shape is predicted by prior residue policy, and where the repair differs from what a generic practice-style or VCE-factor model would recommend.
questions: Is this more than habitus, upaya, practice style, doctrine-as-grammar, report norm, or ordinary lineage pedagogy in new language?
When students switch methods, do they understand the new instruction while their attention still moves in the old way?
Can you distinguish vocabulary confusion from embodied attentional resistance in concrete cases?
Does residue authorization predict any warning, repair, or sequencing decision beyond teacher style, social ecology, intensity, and clinical risk?
Which cases in your tradition reject the categories of residue, grain, sequence, or claimant?
Can an outside coder predict your repair instructions from separate procedure and residue passages before reading the repair section or interviewing you?
relevant_practitioners: Dual-trained vipassana and Advaita practitioners
Theravada insight teachers
Advaita Vedanta teachers
Soto Zen teachers
Dzogchen or Mahamudra teachers
Jodo Shinshu or Pure Land ministers
Sufi teachers familiar with fana and baqa
Christian contemplative or apophatic spiritual directors
Micro-phenomenological interviewers
Contemplative science researchers familiar with VCE
Comparative religion scholars of practice, habitus, and mystical experience
Clinicians familiar with meditation-related adverse effects

primary_pair: MN 10 Satipatthana Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN10.html
SN 22.59 Anatta-lakkhana Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html
Vivekachudamani vv. 17-30, https://www.gita-society.com/wp-content/uploads/PDF/Vivekachudamani.IGS.pdf
Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.7.23, https://www.brhat.in/openlibrary/special/brihadaranyaka-upanishad/3-7-23
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model risks treating texts, teacher norms, report vocabulary, actual phenomenology, and embodied habit as one process. It also risks making every difference count as grain and every doctrinal sentence count as residue policy. Traditions such as Soto practice-realization, Dzogchen direct introduction, Pure Land Other Power, inherited practice, and apophatic silence may reject the developmental sequence or the analyst's residue vocabulary.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Search found close near-neighbors in Foucault on technologies of the self, Hadot on spiritual exercises, Bourdieu and Wacquant on habitus and hysteresis, Saba Mahmood on pious habitus, Lutz, Dunne, Jha, and Saron on the phenomenological matrix, Dunne on Buddhist mindfulness styles, Lindahl and Britton's VCE work, Katz and Sharf on constructed or rhetorically framed experience, and Luhrmann on attentional learning. This audit did not review full books by Foucault, Hadot, Bourdieu, Mahmood, Asad, Lindbeck, or Katz, nor original-language Pali, Sanskrit, Tibetan, Japanese, Arabic, or Persian sources, nor actual practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 10 gives clear procedural direction: attention is not generic noticing, but a guided sequence through body, feeling, mind, mental qualities, hindrances, aggregates, arising, passing, abandoning, and cultivation. SN 22.59 supplies a residue policy for aggregates, including consciousness, by refusing ownership language and ending in disenchantment and release. Vivekachudamani vv. 17-30 gives the opposite directional texture: prerequisites are already aimed toward Advaita recognition through discrimination between permanent and impermanent, dispassion, restraint, faith in scripture and guru, concentration on God, and desire for liberation. Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 authorizes an unseen seer and knower as inner controller. Close-reading supports the claim that procedure and residue policy direct practice, but it does not by itself prove that residue becomes embodied grain. That requires longitudinal practitioner evidence.

title: Layered Direction and Residue-to-Grain Conversion
unlike_statement: Unlike Foucault, Hadot, Bourdieu, Wacquant, Mahmood, Lutz, Dunne, Saron, Lindahl, Britton, Katz, Sharf, Luhrmann, and prior Lumenary Grain and Residue records, this idea's distinct claim is a testable temporal bridge: residue authorization is not only a doctrinal policy or report norm, it may become embodied grain through repeated practice, while procedural direction can install grain earlier. The difference is useful, but thin unless longitudinal and split-source tests show predictive lift beyond habitus, practice-style, report-vocabulary, and VCE-style factor baselines.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Bahiya's immediate release, Tannisho's non-practice Other Power, and Dogen's practice-realization collapse the model's tendency to locate direction in analyzable layers.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: This lowers confidence from candidate discovery to extended. The model remains useful as a coding heuristic only if it includes analyst-frame-refused, no-threshold, practice-realization, radical Other Power, and undecidable values.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Bahiya receives a brief instruction and is said to be released immediately, so textual coding cannot show whether direction came from prior training, readiness, teacher authority, or the instruction itself. Tannisho denies self-owned practice calculation and assigns decisive efficacy to Other Power, so calling nembutsu a directed practice can distort the source. Dogen-style practice-realization refuses a clean sequence of practice first and result later, so layer location may be an analyst imposition.

claim_units: Direction in contemplative training has no single fixed location.
Grain and custody are not rival master explanations, they are layers in a wider map.
Direction can enter through lexical definition, bodily routine, affective posture, attentional operation, teacher authorization, community interpretation, and post-insight integration.

Cross-trained practitioners may experience confusion, flatness, reification, dissociation, or misplaced effort when methods from different traditions are combined without tracking where direction enters.
A pre-registered layer rubric plus micro-phenomenological interviews could test whether prior practice direction predicts felt resistance, warnings, repairs, and outcomes.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Clients or trainees switching from CBT to psychodynamic, ACT, IFS, somatic, or exposure-based work should show layer-specific transfer effects. Old formulation vocabulary, effort style, authority relation, or integration habits should predict predictable stuck points and repair instructions.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Therapeutic systems also place change-direction in layers: case-formulation vocabulary, bodily routine, affective posture, intervention operation, therapist authority, supervision community, and post-session integration.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If switching outcomes are explained by alliance, diagnosis, therapist skill, treatment intensity, and client expectancy with no added layer-specific prediction, the cross-domain structure is weak.

exact_claim: Direction in contemplative training is distributed across layers rather than located only in capacity grain or custody handoff. The model should code lexical definition, bodily routine, affective posture, attentional operation, teacher authorization, community interpretation, and post-insight integration before explaining transfer, mismatch, or harm.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Layer scores should predict held-out warnings and repairs above baselines using tradition name, technique family, teacher style, social ecology, Pargament agency style, Lutz matrix dimensions, and VCE factors.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: If direction layers have real explanatory force, split-source blind coders should infer warning and repair profiles from entry or instruction texts before reading manuals or interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Six-case corpus: MN 10, Vivekachudamani, Tannisho, Bendowa or Genjokoan, a Dzogchen or Mahamudra pointing-out manual, and The Cloud of Unknowing.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Low inter-rater reliability, no predictive lift, or equally strong predictions from simpler baselines would weaken the model.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind raters should identify prior practice families above chance from descriptions of felt resistance, effort, object-orientation, surrender, teacher relation, and integration difficulty during a new practice.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: If cross-training difficulty comes partly from layer mismatch, micro-phenomenological interviews should reveal prior training signatures before participants give doctrinal explanations.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Petitmengin-style interviews with serious dual-trained practitioners during practice transitions.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If raters cannot infer prior training, or if failures track trauma history, intensity, social belonging, or teacher relationship better than direction layers, the model weakens.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Matched instructions with identical attentional operations but different stated aim, authority, and integration rule should yield different reports of agency, effort, trust, self-reification, and repair needs.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: If framing and authorization are independent layers, the same attentional operation should produce different outcomes when embedded in different lexical, devotional, teacher, or community frames.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Ethically low-risk short-practice experiments with experienced practitioners, not vulnerable beginners.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: No measurable difference between differently framed versions, after controlling for expectancy and teacher effects, would weaken the layer claim.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Attentional-operation mismatch should predict flatness or over-efforting repairs; custody or support-locus mismatch should predict guilt, claimant confusion, or devotional repair; community or authorization mismatch should predict trust and belonging repairs.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: If layer mismatch matters clinically, adverse-effect reports should cluster by mismatch type and repair type.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Re-code VCE-style adverse reports and teacher case notes with a pre-registered rubric.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If VCE factors alone explain adverse reports, or if repair instructions do not differ by layer, layered direction adds little.

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate gives a cleaner layer list and makes pre-coding direction before outcome interpretation more central.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major reduction. Treat as consolidation unless separability testing shows predictive gain beyond prior Lumenary ledgers.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very high. The new record mostly consolidates prior grain, custody, claimant, support-locus, transfer, and residue rubrics into one layered direction vocabulary.
near_neighbors.source: Prior Lumenary records supplied in prompt, especially The Grain of Capacity, The Custody of Unclaimed Attention, Capacity Ledger, Claimability and Support Rubric, and Layered Direction and Residue-to-Grain Conversion.

near_neighbors.difference: Dunne focuses mainly on Buddhist styles and mindfulness, not a cross-tradition layer rubric for custody, authorization, and transfer harms.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for instruction-level direction and against broad tradition-level grain.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. Dunne already argues that Buddhist traditions contain multiple mindfulness styles where techniques and theories tend to cohere, including differences in judgment, ethics, memory, present-centered awareness, and nondual practice.
near_neighbors.source: John D. Dunne, Buddhist Styles of Mindfulness, https://www.johnddunne.net/uploads/9/8/5/6/9856107/dunne_j_mindfulness_heuristic.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: It does not foreground teacher authorization, community interpretation, Other Power, or post-insight custody as comparative religion variables.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction. Any empirical test must show predictive lift beyond this matrix.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. The phenomenological matrix decomposes mindfulness practices into manipulable dimensions and explicitly includes posture, affective tone, axiological concerns, and practice instructions.
near_neighbors.source: Lutz, Jha, Dunne, and Saron, Investigating the Phenomenological Matrix of Mindfulness-Related Practices, https://www.johnddunne.net/uploads/9/8/5/6/9856107/lutzjhadunne___saron_investigating_the_phenomenological_matrix_of_mindfulness-related_practices_from_a_neurocognitive_perspective_american_psychologist_oct_2015_.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Lindbeck is mainly theological and doctrinal, not a micro-phenomenological or adverse-practice transfer model.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the claim that religious direction functions as grammar rather than mere belief.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close structural prior. Lindbeck's cultural-linguistic and rule-theory model treats doctrine as grammar internalized through practice and training, shaping religious experience and judgment.
near_neighbors.source: George Lindbeck, The Nature of Doctrine, Open Library record, https://openlibrary.org/works/OL5607588W/The_nature_of_doctrine

near_neighbors.difference: Foucault does not provide this specific contemplative layer rubric or cross-trained practitioner test.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for multi-layer self-transforming practice.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close general prior. Foucault describes practices, with or without help from others, operating on bodies, souls, thoughts, conduct, and ways of being to transform the self toward a valued state.
near_neighbors.source: Michel Foucault, Technologies of the Self, https://foucault.info/documents/foucault.technologiesOfSelf.en/

near_neighbors.difference: Hadot is not focused on contemplative cross-training mismatch, teacher authorization, or custody after loosening attention.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the claim that practices carry direction through more than explicit doctrine.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Hadot's spiritual exercises transform vision, personality, intellect, imagination, sensibility, will, and way of life, often within school-specific regimes.
near_neighbors.source: Pierre Hadot, spiritual exercises, overview and Davidson introduction, https://pages.charlotte.edu/pact/wp-content/uploads/sites/1333/2023/08/Davidson-SpiritualExercisesAncient-1990.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: This source does not distinguish lexical, attentional, devotional, teacher, and post-insight direction in contemplative traditions.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for embodied grain and transfer resistance.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for embodied grain and switching difficulty. Habitus names durable cognitive, conative, affective, and bodily dispositions; hysteresis names mismatch when dispositions meet a changed field.
near_neighbors.source: Bourdieu and Wacquant on habitus and hysteresis, Wacquant abstract, https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/1357034X13501348

near_neighbors.difference: VCE does not claim that direction layers from manuals predict mismatch or repair patterns.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High methodological reduction. Layered direction must outperform VCE-style factor coding.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close methodological prior. VCE codes meditation-related challenges across phenomenology, interpretations, practice factors, practitioner factors, relationships, and health behaviors.

near_neighbors.difference: Pargament studies religious coping and problem-solving, not fine-grained contemplative instruction layers or cross-tradition transfer.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to high reduction for custody, support locus, and claimant distribution.
near_neighbors.overlap: Moderate to close. Self-directing, deferring, and collaborative styles already code where agency and divine support are located.
near_neighbors.source: Pargament et al., Religion and the Problem-Solving Process, https://icmglt.org/icmlibrary/religion-and-the-problem-solving-process-three-styles-of-coping/

near_neighbors.difference: It is a learning theory, not a contemplative phenomenology or doctrine-custody model.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction for community, teacher, identity, and social entry layers.
near_neighbors.overlap: Moderate. Learning is situated in relations among newcomers, old-timers, activities, identities, artifacts, and communities of practice.
near_neighbors.source: Lave and Wenger, Situated Learning: Legitimate Peripheral Participation, Cambridge page, https://www.cambridge.org/highereducation/books/situated-learning/6915ABD21C8E4619F750A4D4ACA616CD/legitimate-peripheral-participation/28CD74BD15EBFABE881F24826917EC4C

near_neighbors.difference: They do not offer the exact split-source predictive layer test for warnings, repairs, and cross-training failures.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for report-shaping and context-shaping claims.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close pressure source. They challenge neutral experience models and show how concepts, traditions, rhetoric, and historical forms shape reports and practice meaning.
near_neighbors.source: Robert Sharf on mindfulness and Steven Katz on contextualism, PubMed Sharf record https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25361692/ and Katz overview https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/13/10/983

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine or candidate discovery. Treat as a comparative and practitioner-facing coding heuristic.

Merge or cross-index with The Grain of Capacity, The Custody of Unclaimed Attention, Capacity Ledger, Claimability and Support Rubric, Transfer Profile, Operational Remainder Ecology, and Layered Direction and Residue-to-Grain Conversion.

Build a bounded coding sheet with fields for lexical direction, bodily routine, affective posture, attentional operation, teacher authorization, community interpretation, support holder, residue policy, integration rule, warning, repair, evidence passage, source layer, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.

Add mandatory values for no-threshold, inherited practice, practice-realization, radical Other Power, direct recognition, teacher-held, vow-held, grace-held, community-held, no-practice-frame, no-direction-frame, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.

Use split-source blind coding. Code direction only from entry, doctrinal, and instruction passages, then predict warnings, safeguards, verification, and repairs from held-out manuals or practitioner interviews.

Compare predictive value against Dunne mindfulness styles, Lutz phenomenological matrix, Lindbeck grammar, Pargament agency styles, habitus and hysteresis, situated learning, VCE factors, teacher style, social ecology, intensity, and clinical-risk baselines.
Run inter-rater reliability before using the rubric publicly. If coders cannot agree on layer values, downgrade the model to interpretive vocabulary only.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-student cases and repair instructions, not agreement with the model.
Use Bahiya, Tannisho, Dogen practice-realization, inherited religion, direct introduction, and successful dual practice as anomaly classes rather than confirming examples.
Do not raise novelty above extended unless the layer rubric predicts held-out warnings, repairs, or switching costs better than parent Lumenary ideas and established near-neighbor theories.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.78 to about 0.42. The useful contribution is not the broad claim that practices carry direction through many layers. That is strongly anticipated by primary texts, Dunne, Lutz, Lindbeck, Foucault, Hadot, Bourdieu, Pargament, VCE, situated learning, Sharf, Katz, and prior Lumenary ledgers. The surviving extension is the pre-registered split-source test: code where direction enters, then predict warnings, repairs, transfer resistance, and adverse effects.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is simply upaya, view and meditation, samaya, doctrine as grammar, habitus, intention setting, religious coping, or ordinary teacher pedagogy in new language. They report that switching failures are mostly teacher fit, intensity, trauma, social belonging, vocabulary, or temperament.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners provide concrete cases where a layer-coded mismatch predicts a repair that a generic technique, tradition, or clinical-risk model misses, for example when a noting-trained student applies deconstructive effort inside direct recognition, or when a Pure Land convert treats nembutsu as self-owned achievement despite instruction to entrust.
questions: Is this more than standard pedagogy about view, method, intention, teacher relation, sangha, and integration?
Can you give a concrete failed cross-training case where this layer rubric would have predicted the repair before you named the tradition?
Which traditions or stages reject the idea that direction is located in practitioner-owned practice?
Does the rubric change sequencing, warning, screening, or repair decisions beyond what you already know?
Can an outside coder predict your repair instruction from separate entry and instruction passages before reading your repair section or interviewing you?

Advaita Vedanta teachers

primary_pair: MN 10 Satipatthana Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN10.html
Vivekachudamani, https://www.gita-society.com/wp-content/uploads/PDF/Vivekachudamani.IGS.pdf
Tannisho sections I to X, https://nembutsu.cc/buddhism/the-tannisho/tannisho-sections-i-to-x/
Longchen Rabjam, Instruction on Trekcho, https://www.lotsawahouse.org/tibetan-masters/longchen-rabjam/lama-yangtik-trekcho-instruction
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can become too absorbent if every difference is assigned to some layer after the fact. Tannisho and radical Other Power traditions can reject the analyst's practice-direction frame. Dogen-style practice-realization can collapse means and result. Bahiya-style immediacy strains any developmental layer sequence. Community, doctrine, teacher style, clinical risk, and social belonging may explain many cases without this model.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The search found strong near-neighbors in Dunne on Buddhist mindfulness styles, Lutz, Jha, Dunne, and Saron on the phenomenological matrix, Lindbeck on doctrine as grammar, Foucault on technologies of the self, Hadot on spiritual exercises, Bourdieu and Wacquant on habitus and hysteresis, Pargament on religious problem-solving styles, Lave and Wenger on situated learning, Sharf and Katz on context-shaped experience, and Lindahl and Britton's VCE study. This audit did not read full monographs by Lindbeck, Asad, Hadot, Bourdieu, Katz, or Sharf, did not check Pali, Sanskrit, Tibetan, Japanese, Middle English, or Chinese terms, and did not include practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts support distribution of direction, but they also reduce novelty. MN 10 does not present bare neutral attention, it gives frames, ardency, hindrance work, aggregate analysis, arising, and disappearance. Vivekachudamani directs the seeker from the start through discrimination, dispassion, teacher relation, and self-knowledge. Tannisho relocates decisive efficacy away from self-owned practice into entrusting and Other Power, even calling nembutsu non-practice and non-good from the practicer's side. Longchenpa's Trekcho instruction moves through preliminary deconstruction, teacher introduction, recognition of rigpa, and sustaining without effort or clinging. This close read supports the model's layer claim, but the structures are already visible in the sources themselves.

title: Layered Direction of Practice
unlike_statement: Unlike Dunne, Lutz, Lindbeck, Foucault, Hadot, Bourdieu, Pargament, VCE, Sharf, Katz, and prior Lumenary ledgers, the surviving distinct claim is a split-source predictive rule: code where practice direction enters before reading outcomes, then test whether layer mismatch predicts warnings, repairs, transfer resistance, and adverse effects better than technique, tradition label, social ecology, teacher style, and clinical risk. The general idea that practice has layered direction is not original.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen's practice-realization identity, inherited religious continuity, and radical Other Power cases.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Reduces confidence in a boundary-centered version. The model should add no-boundary, continuous authorization, practice-realization, inherited continuity, radical Other Power, no-authorization-frame, and analyst-frame-refused values before treating boundary ecology as universal.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If practice and realization are not two moments, or if authorization is continuous rather than a boundary event, the phrase 'at the edge of contemplative practice' misleads. Dogen can make the whole practice field the realization, not a completion threshold. Inherited religion and lay devotion can mature through continuity, community, and repetition without a distinct arrival point. Tannisho-style Other Power can reject the idea that the practitioner or teacher owns the decisive boundary.

claim_units: The decisive unit near contemplative completion is a native authority-boundary, not doctrine, method type, or final experience alone.
Authority-boundaries include maturity recognition, evidential rules, teaching permission, release requirements, and ordinary-conduct re-entry.
Reflexive operations such as confirmation, cancellation, dissolution, and identity must be coded only after native boundaries are established.
If reflexive operations predict authorization, transmission, teaching strategy, and ethical re-entry better than tradition label or metaphysical content, they become a comparative variable.
If they do not predict those outcomes, they remain descriptive vocabulary inside a broader authority ecology.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Professional clinical training and psychotherapy supervision.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: If the structure is real, supervision manuals and credentialing rules should predict therapy-school-specific repair patterns and boundary violations better than method labels alone. Psychoanalytic, CBT, somatic, and family-systems traditions should differ not only by technique but by who may authorize competence, what evidence counts, and how practitioners are corrected after overreach.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A therapeutic school has native authority-boundaries: who may treat, what counts as competence, what evidence licenses independence, what techniques must be released or retained, and how insight returns to ethical client care.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If supervision failures and repairs are predicted just as well by generic legal risk, client population, clinician experience, or institution policy, with no added value from native authority-boundary coding, the comparative structure loses cross-domain force.

exact_claim: At the edge of contemplative practice, comparative analysis should first establish each tradition's native authority-boundary: who recognizes maturity, what evidence counts, who may teach, what must be released, and how realization returns to ordinary conduct. Only after that should reflexive operations such as confirmation, cancellation, dissolution, and identity be coded and tested for predictive value against authorization, transmission, teaching strategy, and ethical re-entry.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders who only see entry, completion, and authorization passages should predict held-out warnings, teaching permissions, and ethical re-entry requirements above chance and above tradition-label baselines.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Native authority-boundary variables are more than descriptive.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding across Zen, Advaita, Dzogchen, Theravada, Teresa-style Christian contemplation, Sufism, Pure Land, and modern secular mindfulness.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Held-out warnings and permissions are predicted equally or better by broad tradition identity, institution type, teacher style, or metaphysical doctrine alone.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Texts coded as method-identity should show different authorization and repair patterns from texts coded as method-cancellation or method-dissolution, even within the same broad tradition family.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Reflexive operations add value after native boundaries are coded.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Compare Soto practice-realization, Rinzai koan testing, Madhyamaka emptiness pedagogy, Advaita self-knowledge, and Teresa's discernment rules.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reflexive-operation labels fail inter-rater reliability or add no predictive value beyond authority-boundary variables.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Traditions where maturity evidence is conduct-centered should show stronger ordinary-life verification rules and stronger warnings against private experience claims than traditions where maturity evidence is teacher-recognition-centered.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Authority ecology governs ethical re-entry.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Manual sections on visions, powers, teaching permission, vows, precepts, humility, compassion, service, and teacher recognition.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Conduct warnings and private-experience suspicion occur independently of coded authority ecology, or mostly track social control intensity.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Pairs that look similar phenomenologically, such as nondual awareness reports, will diverge in authorization, who may teach, required safeguards, and what must be released.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Boundary-first comparison reduces false convergence.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Micro-phenomenological reports paired with manuals, lineage protocols, and teacher interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Phenomenological similarity alone predicts authorization and re-entry patterns as well as boundary coding.

Talal Asad discursive tradition correct form purpose practice authority orthodoxy

Catherine Bell ritualization authority power ritual practice
