near_neighbors.difference: Asad is not proposing a specific contemplative completion rubric that first codes authority-boundaries and then tests confirmation, cancellation, dissolution, and identity against transmission outcomes.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction. The boundary-first and authority-first move is strongly anticipated.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. Asad's discursive tradition treats tradition as authorized instruction about correct practice, transmitted history, power, argument, and the regulation of proper and improper performance.
near_neighbors.source: Talal Asad, The Idea of an Anthropology of Islam, https://voidnetwork.gr/wp-content/uploads/2016/09/The-Idea-of-an-Anthropology-of-Islam-by-Talal-Asad.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Lindbeck is not focused on contemplative completion, teacher authorization, institutional transmission, or held-out predictive tests of reflexive operations.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for boundary-as-grammar and native rule priority.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close structural prior. Lindbeck treats doctrine through a cultural-linguistic and rule-theory model, where communal grammar governs religious speech, experience, and practice.
near_neighbors.source: George Lindbeck, The Nature of Doctrine, Google Books record, https://books.google.com/books/about/The_Nature_of_Doctrine.html?id=_fbYAAAAMAAJ

near_neighbors.difference: Weber is primarily sociological and does not code contemplative reflexive operations at realization boundaries.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for authority, transmission, institutional maturity recognition, and routinized charisma.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for authority ecology. Weber analyzes prophecy, charisma, priesthood, routinization, codified doctrine, pastoral care, congregation, and institutional religious authority.
near_neighbors.source: Max Weber, Sociology of Religion notes and text excerpts, https://fweil.com/s7121/Webersocrel.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Sharf does not supply the proposed authority-boundary-then-operation predictive rubric.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction against final-experience-first comparison.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close pressure source. Sharf challenges treating private meditative experience as the stable comparative unit and criticizes phenomenological readings of Buddhist path terms as discrete inner states.
near_neighbors.source: Robert Sharf, Buddhist Modernism and the Rhetoric of Meditative Experience, Brill, https://brill.com/view/journals/nu/42/3/article-p228_2.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Katz is broader epistemological contextualism, not a concrete authorization-boundary ecology with institutional predictions.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to high reduction for native-source priority and suspicion of universal completion types.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Katz's contextualism resists unmediated mystical-experience comparison and emphasizes tradition-shaped categories, expectations, and interpretation.
near_neighbors.source: Steven Katz contextualism overview, https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/13/10/983

near_neighbors.difference: Bell does not focus on contemplative completion, release of method, or cross-tradition transmission authorization.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction for ecology, power, and practice-bound authority.
near_neighbors.overlap: Moderate to close. Bell's ritualization framework links practice, power, embodied schemes, legitimation, and authority rather than treating doctrine or experience alone as decisive.
near_neighbors.source: Catherine Bell, Ritual Theory, Ritual Practice, Open Library record, https://openlibrary.org/books/OL1538408M/Ritual_theory_ritual_practice

near_neighbors.difference: Foucault does not give a native authorization-boundary test for contemplative maturity.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction for practice as social and ethical technology.
near_neighbors.overlap: Moderate. Foucault frames self-transforming practices as historically situated techniques involving bodies, souls, thoughts, conduct, truth, and help from others.
near_neighbors.source: Michel Foucault, Technologies of the Self, https://foucault.info/documents/foucault.technologiesOfSelf.en/

near_neighbors.difference: Hadot is not centered on authorization boundaries or comparative completion operations.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction for practice, school, conduct, and transformation links.
near_neighbors.overlap: Moderate. Hadot treats philosophical and spiritual traditions as exercises that transform perception, conduct, and way of life inside schools.
near_neighbors.source: Pierre Hadot, Spiritual Exercises, Davidson introduction, https://pages.charlotte.edu/pact/wp-content/uploads/sites/1333/2023/08/Davidson-SpiritualExercisesAncient-1990.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Single-tradition depth source, not a cross-tradition predictive theory.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for Zen cases and for the warning that completion must be read through native authorization protocols.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close within one tradition. Hori shows that koan practice, kensho language, teacher testing, curriculum, ritual formalism, and mystical insight are institutionally mediated rather than reducible to private experience.
near_neighbors.source: G. Victor Sogen Hori, Teaching and Learning in the Rinzai Zen Monastery, Cambridge record, https://www.cambridge.org/core/books/abs/teaching-and-learning-in-japan/teaching-and-learning-in-the-rinzai-zen-monastery/06E010651A6042E1FF3EC9BE242460D9

near_neighbors.difference: VCE does not code native authorization boundaries to predict transmission, teaching permission, or reflexive operation types.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High methodological reduction. The model must outperform VCE-style factor coding.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close methodological prior. VCE codes phenomenology, practitioner factors, practice factors, relationships, teacher and community support, interpretation, remedies, impairment, and integration difficulties.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl, Fisher, Cooper, Rosen, and Britton, The Varieties of Contemplative Experience, PLOS ONE, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine or candidate discovery. Treat as a comparative and practitioner-facing research heuristic.
Rename the core variable to native authorization ecology or authority-boundary coding to avoid implying that every tradition has a discrete boundary event.

Build a split-source coding sheet with fields for maturity evidence, recognition agent, teaching permission, release requirement, conduct verification, institutional holder, safeguard, repair, evidence passage, source layer, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.

Add mandatory values for no-boundary, continuous authorization, practice-realization, inherited continuity, lay devotional continuity, charismatic exception, institution-first, teacher-held, text-held, vow-held, grace-held, community-held, conduct-held, no-authorization-frame, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.

Compare predictive value against Asad's discursive tradition, Weberian authority, Lindbeck doctrine-as-grammar, Sharf and Katz contextualism, Bell ritualization, Foucault technologies of self, Hadot spiritual exercises, situated learning, VCE variables, teacher style, institution type, and clinical-risk baselines.
Do not let the same passage establish the boundary and confirm the predicted warning or repair.
Run inter-rater reliability before using the rubric publicly. If coders cannot agree on boundary fields, downgrade to interpretive vocabulary.
Use Dogen practice-realization, radical Other Power, inherited religion, charismatic antinomian movements, and realization-without-teaching-authorization cases as anomaly tests.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-authorization, premature-teaching, cross-training, and ethical re-entry cases rather than agreement with the model.
Do not raise above extended unless split-source blind coding shows predictive gain over established authority, grammar, institution, ecology, and prior Lumenary ledger models.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.82 to about 0.46. The general insight that contemplative maturity is governed by authority, tradition-internal grammar, institutional recognition, practice, conduct, and power has strong prior art. The useful extension is the operational sequence and test: code native authorization boundaries first, then test whether reflexive operations predict held-out transmission, teaching strategy, ethical re-entry, warnings, and repairs better than established baselines.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is standard lineage discernment, transmission protocol, upaya, spiritual direction, vinaya, ijaza, samaya, doctrine-as-grammar, or institutional authority in new language. They also report that actual authorization depends mainly on teacher judgment, politics, community trust, or conduct, not on the proposed reflexive-operation labels.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners provide concrete cases where the rubric predicts a warning, repair, or authorization decision before tradition label or teacher preference is known, especially cases separating realization, teaching permission, method release, ethical re-entry, and institutional recognition.
questions: Is this more than ordinary lineage authorization, discernment of spirits, upaya, doctrine as grammar, religious authority, or teacher training?
Can an outside coder predict your actual teaching permission, warnings, and repair instructions from held-out native passages before interviewing you?
Which cases in your tradition have realization language without teaching authorization, and what evidence separates them?
Does this rubric change a concrete decision about sequencing, supervision, ethical re-entry, or cross-training repair?

primary_pair: Dogen, Genjokoan, Shohaku Okumura translation, https://brightwayzen.org/wp-content/uploads/2014/11/For-BWZ-Chant-Book-Genjokoan.pdf
Teresa of Avila, Interior Castle, Sacred Texts edition, https://sacred-texts.com/chr/tic/
The Tannisho, Taitetsu Unno translation, https://nembutsu.cc/buddhism/the-tannisho/tannisho-sections-i-to-x/
MN 10 Satipatthana Sutta, Access to Insight record, https://www.accesstoinsight.org/tipitaka/mn/mn.010.soma.html
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. A boundary can be retrospectively constructed wherever a tradition has teachers, texts, warnings, or institutions. The model risks becoming unfalsifiable unless the boundary is coded from a held-out source before predicting transmission, warning, and repair patterns. Some traditions reject the analyst's boundary frame, especially Dogen-style practice-realization, radical Other Power, inherited religion, charismatic antinomian movements, lay devotional continuity, and traditions where realization is private but teaching authorization is institutional or political.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit found strong near-neighbors in Asad's discursive tradition, Weber's sociology of religious authority, Lindbeck's doctrine-as-grammar, Sharf's critique of experience as an authorization category, Katz's contextualism, Catherine Bell's ritualization and power theory, Foucault's technologies of the self, Hadot's spiritual exercises, Lave and Wenger's communities of practice, Hori's Rinzai koan curriculum, and VCE-style contemplative science factor coding. It did not fully read all monographs, original Japanese, Spanish, Pali, Arabic, or Tibetan terms, and it did not interview teachers or institutional historians. This limits confidence.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts support boundary-first reading, but they also reduce novelty. Dogen strains a completion-boundary model because practice and realization are not cleanly sequential, realization is expressed through ongoing practice and verification by all things. Teresa repeatedly subordinates extraordinary experience to discernment, obedience, humility, Christological memory, and conduct, so authority is distributed through confessor, church, fruits, and suspicion of private certainty. The Tannisho relocates decisive efficacy away from self-owned practice and teacherly possession into Other Power, while still policing divergence through lineage memory and warnings against self-calculation. MN 10 gives a practice grammar of ardency, mindfulness, clear comprehension, hindrance work, arising and passing, and relinquishment, but it does not by itself establish later institutional teaching authorization. The close read supports the ecology claim, yet the need to separate realization, recognition, authorization, and conduct is already visible in the sources.

title: Authority-Boundary Ecology
unlike_statement: Unlike Asad, Lindbeck, Weber, Sharf, Katz, Bell, Foucault, Hadot, Hori, VCE, and prior Lumenary ledgers, the surviving distinct claim is a split-source predictive procedure: first code native authority-boundaries from one corpus, then code reflexive operations, then test whether those operations predict transmission, teaching permission, warnings, ethical re-entry, and repair patterns better than tradition identity, metaphysical content, social ecology, institution type, and teacher style. The broader claim that maturity is governed by authority, grammar, practice, institution, and conduct is not original.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Apophatic predication refusal, Zen or Huangbo search-refusal, Dogen practice-realization, and radical Other Power in Shinran.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers originality and model confidence. The model remains useful as a coding heuristic, but not as a discovery unless it handles these anomaly classes without catch-all bins.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases may not follow the sequence credit distribution constrains residue authorization. Apophatic silence can be driven by claims about language and divine transcendence. Huangbo-style search refusal blocks the operation that would generate residue. Dogen collapses practice and realization. Shinran relocates efficacy so thoroughly that nembutsu is framed as non-practice for the practitioner. If these are central cases, the model needs at least a third variable: search grammar, predication theory, or practice-realization structure.

claim_units: Credit distribution is an upstream constraint on post-negation residue policy.
Residue authorization is not fully derivative of credit distribution.
The residue axis has at least five values: positive authorization, explicit refusal, non-positioning, self-resolving remainder, and undecidable silence.
Advaita and early Buddhism differ not only by self versus no-self, but by the interaction between credit grammar and post-negation instruction.
The model should predict practice consequences, warnings, cross-training strain, and translation strain better than either variable alone.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Psychotherapy, addiction recovery, and behavior-change programs
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs with similar techniques but different agency grammar should produce different failure and residue language. Strong self-credit programs should show pride and shame residue. Higher-power programs should show surrender versus passivity tension. Protocol-centered programs should show formalism. Acceptance or innate-health models should show premature completion claims. The interaction should add predictive value beyond alliance, dosage, diagnosis, resources, and social support.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Credit distribution becomes the assignment of change agency to client effort, therapist, group, medication, protocol, higher power, acceptance process, or already-present health. Residue authorization becomes what remains legitimate after the old identity story loosens: responsible agent, no-owner process, surrendered self, witness, relational self, or silence about self.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Outcome and failure language are fully explained by alliance, severity, dosage, socioeconomic pressure, clinician competence, group support, and prior trauma, with no independent effect from agency grammar or post-identity residue.

exact_claim: Translation strain after self-negation is best coded as an interaction between credit distribution, which assigns the power behind transformation, and residue authorization, which says what may be inhabited, refused, left unclaimed, self-resolved, or held in principled silence after ordinary self-identification is unsettled. Credit distribution constrains but does not determine residue authorization, so both variables should be coded separately and tested for incremental predictive value.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Within one credit type, independently coded texts should show more than one residue policy. For example, ground-centered sources should separate Advaita positive authorization, Dzogchen self-resolving remainder, and apophatic undecidable silence.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Credit distribution constrains but does not determine residue authorization.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding of at least six traditions, with inter-rater reliability before any public claim.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: If residue categories collapse into credit categories, or if raters cannot distinguish the residue values without already knowing tradition labels, the second axis is redundant.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Held-out manuals and teacher interviews should show distinct warning and repair profiles, such as pride around practitioner-owned positive remainder, passivity around source-credit, reification around ground-credit, and anti-calculation warnings around Other Power.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The interaction of credit and residue should predict practice consequences better than either variable alone.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Compare interaction model against Pargament agency styles, VCE factors, Lutz matrix variables, and prior Lumenary ledgers.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Warnings are better predicted by institution, teacher style, lineage politics, trauma risk, retreat intensity, or generic spiritual bypassing than by the credit-residue interaction.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Dual-trained practitioners should report different operational instructions at the same apparent nondual or post-negation threshold, such as inhabit witness, do not claim consciousness, rest without fabrication, entrust, or refuse the question.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Residue authorization is separable from doctrine vocabulary.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Micro-phenomenological interviews with Advaita, Theravada, Dzogchen or Mahamudra, Zen, Pure Land, and Christian apophatic practitioners.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners say the differences are only teacher vocabulary, temperament, or institutional identity, and do not change actual sequencing, warnings, or repair.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: When translating between traditions, pairs with similar credit but divergent residue policy should produce more misunderstanding than pairs with divergent metaphysics but similar operational residue rules.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The model should help identify translation strain before doctrinal conflict becomes explicit.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind prediction on translation commentaries and practitioner cross-training cases, including Advaita and Dzogchen, Zen and Shin, and apophatic Christianity and Madhyamaka.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Translation strain tracks explicit metaphysics, historical polemic, language family, teacher authority, or borrowing history better than the proposed variables.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Most primary passages can be coded as positive authorization, explicit refusal, non-positioning, self-resolving remainder, undecidable silence, or analyst-frame refusal.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The current residue taxonomy should be exhaustive enough for initial coding.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pilot coding on Brihadaranyaka 3.7, SN 22.59, Ud 1.10, Tannisho, Dogen, Pseudo-Dionysius, one Dzogchen manual, and one Sufi fana or baqa source.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Large numbers of passages require new categories such as relational remainder, liturgical remainder, ethical remainder, institution-held remainder, no-search, or no-remainder report.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery or doctrine candidate. Merge or cross-index with Practice Architecture as Upstream Condition for Remainder Phenomenology, Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice, Whose Doing Is This?, and the post-negation authorization convergence.
Rename the contribution as a testing protocol: credit-residue interaction coding for translation strain.

Build a split-source coding sheet with fields for credit locus, support holder, residue authorization, predication theory, search grammar, stage, evidence passage, warning, repair, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.

Add mandatory anomaly values: no-search, practice-realization, radical Other Power, apophatic predication refusal, direct-recognition bypass, inherited practice, no-residue report, institution-held authorization, and undecidable.
Do not let the same passage count as both predictor evidence and predicted warning or repair evidence.

Compare predictive power against Pargament agency styles, self-power and other-power, grace-effort theology, Katz contextualism, Lutz matrix, VCE influencing factors, apophatic unsaying, Madhyamaka non-positioning, and prior Lumenary ledgers.
Require inter-rater reliability before using the rubric publicly. If coders cannot distinguish non-positioning, self-resolving remainder, and undecidable silence, collapse or rename the categories.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-student, cross-training, translation, and repair cases rather than agreement with the model.

Do not raise above extended unless blind coding shows the credit-residue interaction predicts held-out warnings, repairs, or translation strain better than credit alone, residue alone, method-reflexivity, search grammar, institution, teacher style, and clinical-risk baselines.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.72 to about 0.38. The exact two-variable partial-coupling structure is already present in prior Lumenary work, especially Practice Architecture as Upstream Condition for Remainder Phenomenology and the post-negation authorization convergence. External prior art strongly anticipates the components: Pargament for agency allocation, self-power and other-power scholarship for credit grammar, apophatic and Madhyamaka sources for non-positioning and silence, VCE and Lutz for multidimensional contemplative coding, and Katz for tradition-shaped experience. The surviving value is a bounded translation-strain coding protocol, not an original doctrine candidate.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say the model is familiar agency, grace, no-self, apophatic, upaya, lineage, or nondual pedagogy language. They cannot name a repair or prediction that differs from ordinary teacher discernment, Pargament, VCE, or prior Lumenary ledgers.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners identify concrete cases where credit alone gives the wrong repair and residue alone gives the wrong repair, while the interaction predicts the needed warning, support holder, or translation caution before tradition labels are revealed.
questions: Is this model more than self-power and other-power, grace and effort, nondualism, apophasis, and standard lineage warnings in new terms?
Can you give a concrete student failure where both credit assignment and residue authorization were needed to choose the repair?
Does the residue taxonomy change how you would sequence instruction, warn students, or translate another tradition's language?
Which cases in your tradition refuse the analyst's question of what remains or who gets credit?

primary_pair: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.7.23, Max Muller translation, https://sacred-texts.com/hin/sbe15/sbe15070.htm
SN 22.59 Anattalakkhana Sutta, accessible translation PDF, https://www.themindingcentre.org/dharmafarer/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/SSD1.2-Anatta-Lakkhana-S-s22.59-piya.pdf
Bhagavad Gita 3.27, Wisdom Library, https://www.wisdomlib.org/hinduism/book/shrimad-bhagavad-gita/d/doc419839.html
The Tannisho, Taitetsu Unno translation, sections 1 to 10, https://nembutsu.cc/buddhism/the-tannisho/tannisho-sections-i-to-x/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can make credit distribution look upstream by definition. Apophatic silence may arise from a theory of predication rather than appropriation risk. Dzogchen and Zen may block the search sequence before residue appears. Pure Land may reject the whole self-owned capacity frame. If the same passages are used to code credit and residue, the model becomes circular.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit used accessible primary translations, local prior Lumenary audits and dialogues, open academic records, and practitioner-facing sources. It did not fully read Pargament's original 1988 article, Sells's full monograph, Katz's original essay, Longchenpa in Tibetan, Shankara in Sanskrit, or practitioner interviews. This prevents any uniqueness claim.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts support the need for more than a self versus no-self contrast, but they also reduce novelty. Brihadaranyaka 3.7 positively identifies an inner ruler and knower through a cosmological sequence, while SN 22.59 denies fitness for ownership across all aggregates including consciousness. The Gita 3.27 weakens egoic doership by attributing action to nature's gunas, but it does not remove all practical agency from the path. The Tannisho is the hardest case for simple credit coding: it relocates efficacy to Amida, refuses teacher ownership, and calls nembutsu non-practice and non-good for the practitioner. That supports credit distribution as real, but it also shows that source-credit traditions can refuse the very analyst category of practice credit.

title: Credit-Constrained Residue Authorization as a Two-Variable Model of Post-Negation Translation Strain
unlike_statement: Unlike the prior Lumenary practice-architecture audit and the post-negation authorization dialogue, this record adds little structural novelty. Its strongest surviving contribution is a narrower translation-strain coding sheet that forces credit distribution and residue authorization to be coded in separate passes, then tests whether their interaction predicts warnings, repairs, and cross-training strain better than either variable alone. Without that test, it is mostly a renamed consolidation.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization identity, radical Other Power in Tannisho, inherited communal religion, and apophatic refusal in Dionysius.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence from candidate discovery to extended. The model needs mandatory no-threshold, practice-realization, radical Other Power, inherited continuity, apophatic refusal, no-custody-frame, continuous authorization, and analyst-frame-refused values.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen removes the gap between method and result, so there may be no threshold where boundary and custody can be assigned. Tannisho places decisive working in Amida's vow while warning against self-calculation, so calling entrusting a local custody handoff can reintroduce the self-power frame the text resists. Inherited religion may mature by continuity and ritual participation rather than by a discernible handoff. Dionysius places the divine Cause beyond affirmation and negation, which destabilizes God as a simple custody recipient.

claim_units: Self-weakening contemplative practice creates a threshold where ordinary ownership of attention and authority is weakened.
Boundary operation is a variable: the method may validate itself, undermine itself, become irrelevant, or need another value such as practice-realization identity.
Custody rule is a variable: freed attention or authority may be assigned to no owner, Self, God, teacher, lineage, vow, conduct, Prajnaparamita, embodied responsiveness, or no custody frame.
The interaction of boundary operation and custody rule may predict verification architecture, teaching strategy, and reentry better than doctrine, boundary alone, or custody alone.
The claim must be tested by independent coding, not inferred from the same passages used to confirm predictions.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Psychotherapy, clinical supervision, and professional formation.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Training systems that alter identity or attention should show distinct termination, supervision, relapse, and ethical-reentry patterns based on the interaction between method-boundary and custody. For example, a protocol that is later internalized should differ from one that is explicitly released, and both should differ when responsibility is held by client values, supervisor authority, group accountability, or professional ethics.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Boundary operation becomes how a method treats itself at maturity: retained protocol, self-undermining tool, embodied skill, or practice-identity. Custody rule becomes where authority and responsibility move after change: client agency, therapist, supervisor, group, protocol, medication, values, professional ethics, or embodied responsiveness.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If outcomes, supervision failures, termination protocols, and ethical repairs are predicted just as well by diagnosis, alliance, institution policy, practitioner experience, or generic risk management, with no added value from boundary-custody interaction.

exact_claim: When contemplative practice weakens ordinary self-ownership of attention and authority, two candidate variables shape what follows: boundary operation and custody rule. Boundary operation asks whether the method validates itself, undermines itself, or becomes irrelevant as the practitioner matures beyond method-talk. Custody rule asks where freed attention and authority may belong afterward: no owner, hidden Self, God, teacher, lineage, vow, conduct, Prajnaparamita, or embodied responsiveness. Their interaction may predict verification architecture, teaching strategy, and reentry more precisely than doctrinal content, boundary operation alone, or custody alone.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coders who code boundary operation from one corpus and custody rule from another should predict held-out verification signs, teaching permission, warning profiles, and reentry disciplines above tradition-label, doctrine-only, boundary-only, and custody-only baselines.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Boundary operation and custody rule interact rather than merely adding two descriptive labels.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pre-registered coding of Advaita, Theravada, Rinzai, Soto, Dzogchen or Mahamudra, Jodo Shinshu, Christian apophatic practice, and Sufi fana or baqa sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The interaction term adds no predictive power, or the same predictions are explained by institution type, teacher style, stage sequence, social ecology, or clinical-risk variables.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Cases with similar boundary cancellation but different custody rules, such as Heart Sutra reliance, Eckhartian Gelassenheit, and Madhyamaka non-positioning, should diverge in verification and reentry. Cases with similar vow or grace custody but different boundary operations should diverge in method retention and warning style.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Pairs sharing one axis but differing on the other should diverge predictably.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Matched primary-text pairs and held-out manuals, plus blind clustering against coded outcomes.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Pairs cluster mainly by broad tradition, institution, genre, teacher lineage, or language family rather than by boundary-custody pairing.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Teachers should report concrete cases where the boundary operation was understood but custody was misassigned, or custody was understood but the method-boundary was mishandled, and they should prescribe different repairs for each.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The variables are observable to practitioners as actual repair distinctions, not just analyst vocabulary.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Structured interviews with teachers and senior practitioners, asking for failed-student and cross-training cases rather than agreement with the theory.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners say the distinction is standard lineage discernment with new labels, or cannot name any repair that differs from ordinary pedagogy, upaya, grace, vow, or supervision.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Independent coders should reach acceptable agreement on boundary operation, custody rule, stage, source layer, and analyst-frame refusal before seeing warnings, verification, and repair passages.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The model can be coded reliably before outcome inspection.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater reliability trial using redacted entry, instruction, completion, and authorization passages.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot distinguish boundary from custody, or agreement appears only after outcome passages are revealed.

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can become circular if boundary, custody, verification, and reentry are inferred from the same passage. It can also translate salvation, liberation, grace, lineage, conduct, and ritual into a modern governance vocabulary of attention and authority. Some traditions may refuse the threshold frame, especially Dogen practice-realization, inherited religion, radical Other Power, apophatic predication refusal, and traditions where authorization is political, communal, sacramental, or continuous rather than contemplative.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit used accessible primary translations, local Lumenary audits and dialogues, open academic records, and practitioner-facing sources. It did not read Japanese, Sanskrit, Pali, Tibetan, Greek, Arabic, or Latin originals, and it did not interview teachers. Further work should read Asad, Lindbeck, Weber, Sharf, Hori, Sells, Pargament, VCE research, Dogen scholarship, Pure Land scholarship, and apophatic theology in greater depth before any stronger novelty claim.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts partly support the model but mostly lower novelty. MN 22 already gives a boundary operation in which the Dhamma is valid for crossing and then not to be grasped, so method validation and method release are staged together. The Heart Sutra negates attainment but preserves reliance on Prajnaparamita, which is almost an exact prior structure for boundary cancellation plus retained custody. Tannisho relocates efficacy to Amida's Original Vow, denies self-powered merit, rejects teacher ownership, and restricts reading to those mature in faith, so custody, verification, and warning are already internally linked. Dogen strains the whole threshold premise: practice-enlightenment and verification by all things collapse the gap between method and completion, making boundary and custody look less like two variables and more like an analyst's grid imposed on a no-threshold practice field.

title: Boundary And Custody At The Threshold
unlike_statement: Unlike Asad, Lindbeck, Sharf, Hori, Pargament, VCE research, MN 22, the Heart Sutra, and prior Lumenary authority and custody ledgers, this idea's surviving distinct claim is a narrow interaction protocol: code boundary operation and custody rule independently, then test whether their interaction predicts held-out verification, teaching permission, warning, repair, and reentry patterns better than doctrine, tradition label, stage, institution, boundary alone, or custody alone. Without that split-source predictive gain, it is mostly a consolidation of prior work.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Native credit-first traditions, especially Shinran's self-power and Other Power, Sri Vaishnava effort and surrender debates, and Sufi maqam and hal distinctions.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: This lowers confidence from strong originality to extended synthesis. The model survives only if it treats native credit-first cases as admissible low-strain cases rather than forcing credit to be secondary everywhere.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The candidate says credit is dependent, but these traditions may make credit grammar itself a native master distinction that organizes entry, practice, failure, and verification. If credit-first coding predicts safeguards better than claimant grammar, institution, or translation strain, the candidate's demotion of credit is too strong.

claim_units: Credit doctrine is a dependent diagnostic variable, not a master taxonomy.
Native claimant grammar must be coded before credit distribution.
Translation strain must be scored before using a cross-tradition comparison as evidence.
Credit distribution should be stage-level, not only tradition-level.
Credit distribution must add predictive power beyond claimant grammar, institution, teacher authority, initiation, and existing religious agency models.
Low-strain comparisons may support taxonomy, while high-strain comparisons should be treated as boundary cases or analogical extensions.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: High-strain comparisons, such as CBT skill practice, psychoanalytic insight, 12-step surrender, and biomedical medication, will produce misleading responsibility taxonomies unless modality grammar is coded first. Stage-level credit should add predictive value mainly where the modality already admits that credit language.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Before crediting change to client effort, therapist skill, medication, group support, unconscious process, or surrender, code what each modality permits to count as agent, action, transformation, and cause. Then score translation strain between modalities before comparing credit allocation.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: General locus-of-control or self-efficacy measures predict adherence, relapse, and repair across modalities without needing modality grammar or translation-strain controls.

exact_claim: Credit distribution should not function as a master taxonomy. First code the native claimant grammar, meaning what may count as agent, action, transformation, and causal attribution. Then score translation strain between traditions. Only after that should stage-level credit distribution be tested for added prediction of safeguards beyond claimant grammar, institution, teacher authority, initiation structure, and existing agency-allocation models. Low-strain cases may support taxonomy; high-strain cases should count as boundary cases or analogies, not confirming evidence.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In blind coding, credit distribution adds clear predictive value mainly in low-strain cases where credit categories are native or near-native, such as self-power and Other Power, grace and effort, or maqam and hal.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Split-source coding of claimant grammar and translation strain should improve prediction before credit distribution is added.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: A generic self, divine, collaborative credit scale predicts safeguards, warnings, and repairs equally well across low-strain and high-strain cases.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders reliably assign stage-level credit categories in high-strain cases and those categories predict held-out safeguards without claimant grammar controls.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Practitioner manuals and interviews identify failures such as pride in surrender, quietism after grace, self-powered misuse of Other Power language, antinomian readings of non-doership, or passivity after direct recognition.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reported failure cases track intensity, teacher style, institution, trauma history, or general misunderstanding without relation to credit transition.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The differences disappear when socialization, institution, teacher authority, or initiation structure are controlled.

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The protocol could become circular if the same passage codes claimant grammar, credit distribution, and predicted safeguards. It can also impose an analyst vocabulary of claimant, credit, and strain on traditions that reject agency accounting, especially Dogen practice-realization, Madhyamaka non-positioning, apophatic theology, Dzogchen direct recognition, and inherited devotional practice.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit used accessible translations and open secondary sources but did not read Sanskrit, Japanese, Tamil, Arabic, Pali, or Tibetan originals. It did not fully reread Lindbeck, Katz, Clooney, J. Z. Smith, Sandmel, Rambo, or Pargament's full article corpus. It also lacks practitioner interviews and statistical comparison against existing models.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The Gita is a strong test case for why credit needs claimant grammar first. It preserves obligation to act, denies simple ego-doership, separates action from fruits, and lists multiple causes of action, including bodily basis, instruments, effort, and divine factor. A simple self versus God credit scale misses that action, fruit, ego, duty, and causation are differently distributed. Tannisho creates a sharper strain case. It relocates efficacy to Amida's Vow, rejects self-powered merit, denies Shinran ownership over disciples, and describes nembutsu as neither ordinary practice nor good act because it arises through Other Power. Coding both texts with the same deferring or collaborative category would flatten native rules about what kind of action is even claimable. The close read supports the candidate's sequence, but it also shows that the primary traditions already force much of the insight.

Without that added predictive gain, the idea is mostly a renamed consolidation of existing comparison and agency-allocation methods.

claim_units: A method does not finish when it produces an insight; it finishes when the practitioner learns what may be kept without owning it. Some practices confirm the result and retain the method as a continuing way of seeing. Some validate the method for crossing and then require release. Some undermine the very frame that made the result seem possessable, yet remain embodied as training, community, ethics, or supervision. The decisive question is not only whether a method validates or undermines itself, but who or what holds custody after the method can no longer be treated as a private possession. T

exact_claim: A method does not finish when it produces an insight; it finishes when the practitioner learns what may be kept without owning it. Some practices confirm the result and retain the method as a continuing way of seeing. Some validate the method for crossing and then require release. Some undermine the very frame that made the result seem possessable, yet remain embodied as training, community, ethics, or supervision. The decisive question is not only whether a method validates or undermines itself, but who or what holds custody after the method can no longer be treated as a private possession. This matters for modern people whose worth depends on performance: even a liberating method can become another credential unless its completion includes a rule for release, embodiment, and re-entry into ordinary responsibility.

exact_claim: A serious practice does not only produce a result; it also has to decide what to do with itself at the end. Three endings recur. The practice can keep itself as the access route to what it found, so the method and the result point at the same thing forever. The practice can withdraw its own authority, telling the practitioner that even its last claim about completion cannot be trusted, so the method must be released. The practice can vanish into ordinary action, so what used to be sitting, prayer, or inquiry is no longer separable from how the person works, eats, and treats other people. Two questions sort these endings cleanly. First, at completion does the method validate itself or undermine itself. Second, is the method retained, released, or embodied. Most damage in long-term practitioners comes from importing the wrong ending into the wrong method: keeping a method that was supposed

title: Three ways a practice can end
unlike_statement: No unlike statement is available until the originality audit completes.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Self-luminous recognition traditions and deliberate solitary practice, such as Advaita svaprakasha language, some hermit lineages, Quaker inner-light language, and practitioners who leave abusive communities because communal recognition is less trustworthy than disciplined solitude.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence from candidate discovery to extended. The model remains useful only if it distinguishes trustworthy recognition, unsafe recognition, valid solitude, and pathological isolation.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases suggest that some traditions authorize recognition through intrinsic self-evidence, conduct over time, scripture, or inward confirmation rather than a named recognition partner. They also show that community can misname experience and that the absence of a trusted corrector may be protective rather than pathological.

claim_units: A method can produce or occasion an experience but cannot by itself authorize the meaning of that experience.
The same instruction changes meaning when the recognizing community changes.
Recognition is performed by trusted persons, lineages, texts, institutions, or communities, not by the method as an isolated object.
Modern self-directed practitioners face a recognition gap when they borrow practices without continuing interpretive partners.
The human-condition target is isolation, meaning loss, and achievement-contingent self-worth among solo seekers, app meditators, cross-tradition readers, and retreatants without continuing guidance.

Non-fit cases include acute psychiatric destabilization, scrupulosity, grief needing ordinary company, abusive or false recognition communities, and practitioners already inside stable teacher relationships.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Self-guided users of powerful therapeutic or coaching techniques will show more unstable self-labeling and overclaiming when they lack trusted review, even when the technique itself is evidence-based.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A technique does not certify the meaning of the change it produces. A client or coach needs a supervision or interpretive ecology to distinguish insight, avoidance, transference, skill acquisition, and identity claim.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Outcomes and interpretation stability are fully explained by technique quality, symptom severity, and user motivation, with no independent effect from recognition or supervision ecology.

exact_claim: A contemplative practice does not name what happens through it. Its result is named by trusted recognition partners, traditions, teachers, communities, or other accepted authorities. Modern self-directed practitioners often inherit methods without the partners who once interpreted those methods, so after a meaningful shift they should ask whom they would actually trust to tell them what happened, and if no one can be named, carry that absence as part of the experience.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Dual-trained practitioners will report different completion judgments, warnings, and integration duties for similar phenomenology depending on which teacher, lineage, text, or community they treat as authoritative.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Recognition ecology materially changes interpretation after similar practice experiences.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Micro-phenomenological interviews with dual-trained practitioners and split-source coding of teacher responses.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners report stable interpretation and integration regardless of recognition community, after controlling for practice type, intensity, prior beliefs, and mental-health history.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Solo practitioners without trusted correction will show higher rates of interpretation oscillation, premature identity claims, or collapse into doubt than practitioners with stable, non-coercive guidance.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Modern self-directed practice produces distinctive recognition-gap patterns.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Prospective survey of app meditators, retreatants, and lineage practitioners using VCE-style appraisal and support measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: These patterns occur at similar rates in well-supervised settings, or are better predicted by trait anxiety, social isolation, or adverse meditation effects than by recognition ecology.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: After three uses, stable solo practitioners report less status-claiming and less self-suspicion, while preserving clear memory of the experience and ordinary functioning.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Recognition Gap exercise helps its target cohort by loosening interpretation without negating experience.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week low-risk pilot with pre-post measures of rumination, isolation, inflation, and grounded action.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The exercise increases shame, obsessive doubt, withdrawal, or dependence on imagined authorities, or performs no better than a generic journaling prompt.

near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. Lindbeck's cultural-linguistic model says religious experience is shaped by communal symbol systems and doctrine functions like grammar for speech and conduct.

near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Sharf challenges decontextualized meditation and the modern privileging of private experience over institution, doctrine, ritual, and tradition.

primary_pair: MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta, Thanissaro Bhikkhu translation, https://www.accesstoinsight.org/tipitaka/mn/mn.022.than.html

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The idea may overcorrect from method grammar to community authorization. Some methods do constrain interpretation internally, and some practitioners deliberately leave communities because the available recognition is false, coercive, or unsafe. The model should not make loneliness look like doctrinal failure, and it should not imply that any community recognition is better than no recognition.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The search found strong structural neighbors in Talal Asad's discursive tradition, George Lindbeck's cultural-linguistic grammar, Robert Sharf's critique of Buddhist modernism, Ignatian discernment, and the VCE meditation-challenges literature. The audit did not close-read Japanese, Pali, Sanskrit, or Catholic primary-language sources. It also lacks interviews with solo practitioners and lineage teachers.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 does not leave Arittha's interpretation to private experience. The community reports the misreading, the Buddha cross-examines it, and the raft simile then teaches right use and release of the Dhamma. The method is not self-naming because wrong grasp is corrected by teacher and sangha. Bendowa strains the model. Dogen collapses practice and realization so strongly that there is no simple later event to label, yet the text still frames zazen through transmitted Buddha-dharma, trust, and instruction. The comparison supports the recognition claim, but it also shows the claim is already native to many practice ecologies rather than newly discovered.

title: A practice cannot name itself
unlike_statement: Unlike Asad, Lindbeck, Sharf, Ignatian discernment, and VCE, this idea's distinct contribution is not that communities shape religious meaning. Its possible contribution is a narrow practitioner diagnostic: after a contemplative shift, ask who could correct the interpretation, and treat the inability to name such a person as data about the experience rather than as proof or failure.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization, radical Other Power in Tannisho, inherited communal religion, and successful ordinary ethical practice without a marked peak experience.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Prevents candidate-discovery status. The model is useful as a heuristic only if it can code no-threshold, no-peak, Other Power, inherited practice, and practice-realization without forcing them into a modern after-experience frame.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases resist the sequence of method, result, and return. Dogen makes practice and realization inseparable. Tannisho relocates efficacy to Amida's Vow and can make nembutsu non-practice from the practitioner's side. Inherited religion may not have a discrete completion event. Ordinary ethical formation may return without peak experience at all.

claim_units: Practice completion should be judged by return to ordinary conduct, not by peak experience alone.
Completion has two pressures: whether the result stands or is undermined, and whether the method is retained, released, or embodied.

Different primary texts model different endings: MN 22 releases the raft after right use, Heart Sutra negates attainment while retaining reliance, Mandukya allows a known Self, Rinzai koan work exhausts ordinary thinking while remaining curriculum, and Dogen collapses before and after through practice-realization.
The target modern problem is achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, and compulsive conversion of every result into identity.
The target cohort is stable adults who already use practice, study, work, prayer, or reflection and tend to turn outcomes into pride, shame, comparison, or status.

Non-fit cases include acute crisis, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, dissociation, trauma activation, scrupulosity, destabilizing meditation experiences, and people under explicit teacher, vow, or clinical instructions.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: In music, surgery, athletics, or software apprenticeship, scaffold-retain, scaffold-release, and scaffold-embody patterns will predict different coaching warnings and transition failures better than skill level alone.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A learning method is not complete when it produces a peak performance or test score. It is complete when the learner knows whether to keep the scaffold, remove it, or embody it as fluent conduct.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Transition failures are fully explained by task difficulty, talent, hours practiced, and supervisor quality, with no added value from scaffold-retain, release, or embody coding.

exact_claim: A practice is not complete when it gives a person an experience. It is complete only when it teaches the person how to return to ordinary life. The return test asks whether the method lets the result stand or undermines the claim to have a result, and whether the method should be kept, set down, or carried as conduct. The practical danger is turning method or insight into proof of worth, or abandoning the method before it has trained ordinary conduct.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Manuals or teachers whose methods are coded as retained after insight will prescribe different warnings and return duties than those coded as released or embodied, even within the same broad tradition.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The two-pressure return grid has predictive value beyond broad tradition labels.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding of primary instruction passages, held-out warnings, teacher interviews, and inter-rater reliability.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Warnings and return duties are better predicted by institution type, teacher style, intensity, clinical risk, or ordinary moral teaching than by the two-pressure grid.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: After two weeks, stable adults using the check report lower pride, shame, comparison, and post-result rumination, with equal or improved ordinary responsibility.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Return Check helps achievement-contingent practitioners avoid turning practice into self-proof.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small randomized pilot comparing Return Check, generic journaling, and rest-and-plan controls.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases rumination, self-surveillance, spiritual pride, avoidance of work, or contempt for ordinary achievement, or performs no better than a simple rest-and-plan prompt.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Practitioners trained in Advaita inquiry, Prajnaparamita practice, raft-style early Buddhist training, and Soto practice-realization will describe different appropriate relations to insight: stable recognition, resisted attainment, released tool, or ongoing practice-conduct identity.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Cross-training will expose different return grammars.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Dual-trained practitioner interviews and behavior-coded follow-up after comparable retreat experiences.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners converge on the same return rule after controlling for teacher and personality, or differences reduce to vocabulary without behavioral, warning, or repair consequences.

The model may impose a modern performance and safety rubric on traditions whose own test is surrender, grace, vow, direct recognition, ritual continuity, or inherited participation. primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit found strong near-neighbors in Smith on Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Sells on unsaying, Asad, Lindbeck, Sharf, VCE, Hadot-style spiritual exercises, Zen oxherding return motifs, and Buddhist raft or upaya literature. primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is a close primary near-neighbor for validated-then-released method. It teaches right grasp, crossing, and release of the raft, so the candidate's set-down category is old. The Heart Sutra complicates the model because it negates attainment yet retains reliance on Prajnaparamita and mantra. This supports the candidate's claim that undermining result does not always mean abandoning method. Mandukya adds a different pressure: negation culminates in the Self that is to be known. Dogen strains the whole after-completion frame because practice and realization are inseparable, so return is not a later test but the practice itself.

title: The Test Is How You Return
unlike_statement: Unlike the raft simile, apophatic unsaying, therapeutic readings of Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Dogen practice-realization, VCE aftercare, Asad's discursive tradition, and Lindbeck's doctrine grammar, this idea's distinct claim is a practical comparative test: code whether a method validates or undermines the result, then code whether the method is retained, released, or embodied, and see whether that interaction predicts warnings, re-entry duties, identity risks, and repairs better than doctrine, institution, teacher style, or clinical-risk variables alone.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Observer-independent clocks and nonhuman timing systems, such as cesium clocks, pulsars, GPS satellites, automated trading systems, and biological clocks.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence sharply for the physics claim and keeps the idea as a renamed or applied extension, not a candidate discovery.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: They count transitions, coordinate records, and guide action without a conscious holder of past, present, and future. This does not refute the phenomenology of legibility for persons, but it does refute any strong claim that physical clocks require human temporal holding in order to measure.

claim_units: Clock time is operational counting, not the full meaning of time.
A clock reading becomes legible only within a held structure of remembered past, attended present, and intended future.
Physics can coordinate events and relations but cannot replace lived temporal participation.
The felt present is neither mere illusion nor the only real thing, it is where memory, care, and intention become actionable.
The modern use case is anxiety, rumination, future dread, burnout, and achievement-contingent self-worth.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Music, sport, and high-skill performance coaching
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Coaching cues that explicitly bind learned memory, present sensation, and near-future intention will reduce choking and post-error rumination better than now-only cues for anxious high achievers.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A performer does not succeed by collapsing into the instant. Effective presence carries prior repetitions, current sensory feedback, and intended phrase or play without becoming self-judgment.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Performance and distress are fully explained by practice hours, sleep, coach quality, and generic arousal control, with no added value from temporal-width cues.

exact_claim: Clocks count coordinated transitions but do not contain the lived holding of memory, attention, and expectation. The healthy present is a disciplined width that carries past and future without collapsing into rumination, thin-now mindfulness, or future dread.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In a two-week pilot with stable adults under deadline pressure, the practice reduces both rumination and future anxiety without increasing planning compulsion, dissociation, or self-surveillance.

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model risks smuggling phenomenological legibility into physical measurement. A cesium clock, pulsar, or automated control system can count transitions without a humanly held past and future. The practice claim also risks turning anxious people into managers of their own temporal width.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit used accessible primary texts, SEP articles, source cards, and open academic summaries. It did not read Husserl in German, Heidegger in German, Bergson in French, the full Dogen Uji translation history, or full clinical literature on Time Perspective Therapy. No practitioner interviews were run.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Augustine already gives the core triad: past and future are present in the soul as memory and expectation, and time is measured in the mind. Bergson is an even closer clock-side source: the clock does not measure lived duration, it counts simultaneities while consciousness preserves succession. Together they contain most of the candidate's structure before the physics and practice framing are added.

title: Time Is Held, Not Counted
unlike_statement: Unlike Augustine, Bergson, Husserl, Heidegger, balanced time perspective, and relational time physics, this idea's possible distinct contribution is a narrow practice hypothesis: explicitly train a present that carries memory and intention, then test whether it reduces both rumination and future dread better than present-only mindfulness, balanced time perspective coaching, or ordinary planning.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Caregiving, medicine, teamwork, school, transport, and wage labor create shared deadlines that are not merely borrowed comparison clocks.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps the idea at extended. It can only survive by sharply separating coordination obligations from status comparison.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Some external clocks are obligations of justice, safety, and trust. If path language lets a person dismiss medication times, childcare pickup, workplace dependencies, or promises, the model becomes harmful and false at the practice level.

claim_units: A clock measures repeatable transitions along a worldline.
There is no single cosmic now that ranks all lives as early, late, ahead, or behind.
The felt now is where records have reached this body and action remains possible.
Clocks should coordinate obligations without becoming metaphysical or social verdicts.
The modern use case is time anxiety, digital comparison, burnout, and feeling late in life.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams using dependency-aware local timelines, with explicit interface commitments, will show less false lateness blame and better bottleneck diagnosis than teams managed only by global comparison dashboards.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A distributed system has local process histories and coordination protocols, not one privileged global now. The practical question is which timestamps mark real dependencies and which merely create misleading rank comparisons.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: A single global deadline dashboard predicts delays, responsibility, morale, and coordination failures as well as or better than dependency-aware local timelines.

exact_claim: A clock measures path-dependent physical change along one worldline, not a universal river of time. The felt now is local enough for conduct and responsibility, and modern suffering worsens when another person's clock becomes a verdict on one's own life rather than a tool for coordination.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: People trained in the distinction report less behind-in-life and comparative shame language while keeping equal or better punctuality, promise-keeping, and planning behavior.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The owed-coordination versus borrowed-comparison distinction has practical value.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized pilot with deadline-stressed students, caregivers, founders, and knowledge workers.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Missed obligations increase, avoidance rises, or outcomes are no better than self-compassion, time management, or ordinary social-clock psychoeducation.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Students introduced to worldlines and proper time before block-universe diagrams will make fewer claims that relativity proves the present is fake or that there is one hidden cosmic schedule.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Proper-time-first pedagogy changes metaphysical misconceptions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Physics education experiment with pre-post misconception coding.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Misconception rates match standard lessons, or the path framing worsens physics accuracy.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Digital comparison exposure and perceived social-clock deviation predict behind-in-life distress after controlling for actual deadlines, workload, income, age, and caregiving load.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Behind-in-life suffering is partly driven by borrowed social clocks rather than workload alone.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Survey and diary study using social comparison, social-clock deviation, workload, and distress measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Distress is fully explained by material overload, insecurity, discrimination, sleep loss, or clinical anxiety, with no added effect from comparison clocks.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a new physics claim. Name proper time, local becoming, social clock theory, chrononormativity, and social acceleration as prior art.
Merge or cross-index with Clocks Do Not Own Time unless a separability test shows independent predictive value.

novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.50 to 0.34. Human-condition fit is direct but already well-covered by social clock theory, chrononormativity, social acceleration, burnout, and perfectionism literature. Target cohort: functioning adults who meet obligations but feel late in life because of visible peer timelines. Non-fit cases: acute crisis, severe depression, mania, psychosis, addiction withdrawal, people avoiding duties, and people facing structural exploitation where schedule pressure is materially imposed rather than internal comparison.

practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the distinction to reduce comparative shame while preserving obligations, and can predict which deadlines are owed coordination versus status-contaminated comparison.

primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Einstein defines time through clocks, local readings, light-signal synchronization, and moving-clock comparison. Minkowski then gives world-points and world-lines as the natural spacetime structure. The candidate's physical core, a clock measures along a path, is therefore close to standard proper-time and worldline thinking rather than a new model.

title: A Clock Measures A Path
unlike_statement: Unlike Einstein, Minkowski, local becoming, Rovelli, Page-Wootters, Dogen, social clock theory, chrononormativity, and the prior Lumenary clock record, this idea's possible contribution is a testable practical distinction: separate owed coordination times from borrowed comparison times, then see whether that reduces behind-in-life distress without weakening punctuality or responsibility.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Coercive or incompetent correction ecologies, including abusive teachers, shame-based communities, misapplied clinical labels, and peer groups that punish dissent.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps the status at extended. Publishability depends on adding unsafe-authority, valid-solitude, and clinical-risk stops before any practice promotion.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If correction is treated as inherently safer than private interpretation, the model can direct vulnerable practitioners toward the very authority structure that distorts or harms them. The rule must distinguish trustworthy correction from coercive control.

claim_units: Powerful states and a practice's own finality language are insufficient warrants for trust.
A serious result should be coded by two variables: what claim the practice permits and what remains able to correct the claimant.
Methods may confirm a recognition, undermine every claim, be released after use, or become embodied as conduct.
Release of the raft should not mean release of correction.
The practice candidate targets isolated, self-directed practitioners who may turn experiences into status, shame, or identity.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: AI model governance and incident review
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams that preserve correction channels after automation will catch high-confidence failures, drift, and misuse earlier than teams that treat the model's output as self-validating.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A high-performing model or method should not close the evaluation loop around itself. After a system produces a result, an independent audit, monitoring, escalation, or user-feedback channel must remain able to correct it.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Closed-loop systems with no independent correction perform as safely and adaptively as audited systems across drift, edge cases, user harm, and escalation metrics.

exact_claim: After a serious practice result, the decisive safety question is not only whether the method is retained, released, confirmed, or undermined. The result remains spiritually immature if it removes every trustworthy correction path: teacher, text, community, ordinary conduct, duty, clinical boundary, or observed effects over time.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coding will find held-out warnings, teacher checks, conduct tests, vows, texts, or community checks even in sources that strongly teach method release or no attainment.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Traditions that release a method still retain correction paths.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Primary-text corpus coded separately for method fate, claim permission, correction holder, warnings, repairs, and teaching permission.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Mature sources release method and correction with no replacement, and practitioners show stable ethical integration without identifiable correction holders.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable solo practitioners using the check after unusual practice report less spiritual status-claiming, less shameful doubt, and no rise in dependency, rumination, or isolation compared with plain journaling.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases paranoia, scrupulosity, teacher dependence, shame, or performs no better than rest, ordinary conversation, or established teacher check-ins.

falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Absence of trustworthy correction predicts unstable interpretation after powerful practice.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Instability is better predicted by clinical risk, sleep loss, community abuse, teacher mismatch, or practice intensity, with no independent correction-path effect.

novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.48 to 0.36. Human-condition fit is real but already strongly supported by loneliness, meaning-loss, perfectionism, burnout, spiritual-direction, and meditation-safety prior art. Target cohort: stable self-directed practitioners, app meditators, cross-tradition seekers, and retreatants without continuing guidance. Non-fit cases: acute crisis, psychosis, mania, dissociation, addiction withdrawal, severe depression, abusive communities, and practitioners already under competent teacher or clinical care.
