primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is already a strong source for this structure. Arittha's private interpretation is challenged by monks and then by the Buddha before the raft simile appears, and the text pairs right grasp with later release. Ignatius gives an even closer practitioner rule: after a consolation, later resolutions and opinions need examination before being trusted. Together they already contain the core pattern, experience or method may be valid, but interpretation still needs correction.

title: Keep What Can Correct You
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 22, Ignatian discernment, VCE, James, Asad, Lindbeck, Sells, and the prior Lumenary recognition-gap audit, this idea's possible contribution is a narrow safety heuristic: after method release, verify that some trustworthy correction path remains, and test whether naming that path reduces inflation, shame, and isolated overinterpretation without increasing dependency.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Stage-mixed traditions and practitioners, where active effort, surrender, grace, teacher recognition, ordinary conduct, and no-attainment are all present at different moments.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps the idea at extended. It can only rise if voice coding predicts warnings, confusion, and repair better than self-power, Other Power, Pargament agency style, teacher style, and clinical-risk baselines.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If most actual paths shift voices by stage, role, and context, then active versus middle voice will not sort traditions or predict guidance. Pure Land practitioners still say the nembutsu, Zen practitioners still sit, Christian grace traditions still discipline attention, and high-striving nondual practitioners may still benefit from release advice despite no-owner doctrine.

claim_units: The validate-versus-undermine and retain-abandon-embody grid is mostly prior art, not discovery.
Dogen, Shinran, and the Heart Sutra break the grid by rejecting an active owner who finishes and assigns custody.
The better variable may be grammatical voice of completion-talk: active, middle, passive, or mixed.
Release teaching fits people who believed they held or earned the result.
The modern human problem is achievement-contingent self-worth and burnout, not spiritual completion in general.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Coaches who screen for perceived result ownership before giving detachment advice will reduce perfectionistic rumination and burnout better than coaches who give universal 'let go of the outcome' advice.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Advice to let go of outcomes helps people who over-own results as proof of worth. It can misfire for people whose outcomes are mainly constrained by systems, teams, luck, injury, caregiving load, discrimination, or externally assigned roles.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Screened and universal advice have equal effects, or material constraints, workload, sleep, discrimination, team support, and clinical variables fully explain outcomes with no added effect from ownership-language fit.

exact_claim: Advice to use a method, release it, and not own the result is not a universal account of practice completion. It is medicine for active-voice, self-power practitioners who believe effort earns results and convert those results into worth. Other-power, practice-realization, and no-attainment sources strain the release frame because they deny the practitioner as holder, the method as completed possession, or the linear after in which release would occur.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: High-striving practitioners who describe results as earned will show reduced pride, shame, comparison, and burnout after the Earning Check, while other-power or practice-realization practitioners will show little benefit or increased self-monitoring from the same instruction.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Release teaching is cohort-specific medicine for active earning and result-ownership.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized pilot stratified by self-power language, perfectionism, tradition background, and achievement-contingent self-worth.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: All cohorts benefit equally, or the instruction mainly licenses avoidance, passivity, or contempt for ordinary responsibility.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coding of completion-talk as active, middle, passive, mixed, or no-voice predicts held-out warnings, repairs, and supervision needs better than retain, release, embody categories alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Grammatical voice predicts practice guidance better than custody-grid coding.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source codebook tested on MN 22, Tannisho, Dogen, Heart Sutra, Rinzai koan curriculum, Christian grace texts, and practitioner interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Custody values, tradition identity, teacher style, institution type, or Pargament agency styles predict guidance as well as or better than voice coding.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders will overuse embodied-without-ownership for Dogen, Shinran, Heart Sutra, Dzogchen, apophasis, and other hard cases, with low inter-rater reliability and weak prediction of warnings.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The embodied-without-ownership cell is too elastic.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater trial comparing the old two-axis grid against active, middle, passive, and mixed voice labels.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The cell has clear boundaries, high inter-rater reliability, and predicts concrete repairs better than voice coding.

title: You cannot release what you never held
unlike_statement: Unlike Lewin on middle voice, Shinran on Other Power, Dogen on practice-realization, Pargament on religious coping styles, Heart Sutra no-attainment reliance, Smith, Sells, and prior Lumenary completion models, this idea's possible contribution is a testable fit rule: give release-the-method advice only to practitioners whose own language shows active earning and result-ownership, then test whether the advice helps them more than it helps other-power, nondual, or practice-realization practitioners.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen's practice-realization identity and Shinran's Other Power.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in originality. The model should first code ownership and temporal completion as scope conditions.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen strains the premise that a road first leads to an end and then receives an after-use instruction. Shinran strains the premise that the practitioner owns the road, trust, or result enough to retain, release, or embody it. These cases may sit outside the grid's conditions of askability.

claim_units: Completion is not sufficient; a practice needs guidance for its own after-use.
The proposed structure has two variables: proof relation, validating versus undermining possession, and carrying relation, retained, released, or embodied.
Hybrid cases such as MN 22, the Heart Sutra, Rinzai koan curriculum, and Dogen's practice-realization expose the weakness of a simple confirm-or-cancel typology.
The practical target is achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, compulsive self-improvement, and spiritual identity built from once-helpful tools.
The After-Use Check asks what to keep, what to set down, and what to live.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Therapy, coaching, productivity systems, and professional training.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Manuals for effective training should differ by after-use relation: retained methods require routine and supervision, released scaffolds require stopping rules, and embodied methods require observable conduct markers. High achievers should benefit from explicit after-use boundaries more than from open-ended self-improvement tracking.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A method that produces benefit needs an after-use instruction: continue as a protocol, retire as scaffolding, or translate into ordinary conduct.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Training outcomes are explained by dosage, accountability, teacher quality, and baseline mental health, with no added predictive value from after-use categories.

exact_claim: A practice is not trustworthy merely because it produces a strong insight. It must also give after-use guidance: whether its result is validated or possession of the result is undermined, and whether the practice should then be retained, set down, or embodied in ordinary conduct. The modern use case is preventing achievement-driven practitioners from turning methods, insights, therapy, meditation, or productivity systems into proof of worth.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coding will find distinct markers for retain, release, embody, no-threshold, practice-realization, and no-owner cases, and those markers will predict held-out warnings, verification rules, and repair practices.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Mature practice traditions vary systematically in after-use guidance.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater coding of MN 22, Heart Sutra, Dogen Bendowa or Genjokoan, Tannisho, Rinzai koan curriculum sources, apophatic Christian texts, and Sufi fana or baqa sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot agree on the categories, or tradition identity, teacher style, institution type, and general agency models predict warnings just as well.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Achievement-driven participants with high self-worth contingency report less rumination, comparison, and method-identity after using the check, without reduced responsibility.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The After-Use Check helps the intended modern cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week randomized pilot stratified by perfectionism, burnout, self-worth contingency, and clinical-risk screen.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases self-monitoring, shame, avoidance, or tool-performance pressure, or performs no better than generic journaling or rest-and-plan prompts.

title: The Road Must Know Its End
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 22, upaya, Sells, Smith, Dogen scholarship, and prior Lumenary custody models, this idea's possible contribution is a bounded two-variable after-use rubric that predicts when a practitioner should keep a method, set it down, or let it appear as conduct, especially for achievement-driven people who turn tools into proof of worth.

It is relocated from self-ownership to vow, practice, teacher, community, or form. The boundary claim would then be overstated.

claim_units: Keep, release, embody assumes practitioner ownership of the method or result.
Keep, release, embody assumes a temporal after in which custody can be decided.
Shinran's Other Power refuses practitioner ownership, calculation, and self-generated entrusting.

The bounded model has a modern contraindication: depleted people may be harmed by another stewardship prompt.
The No-Audit Check is a low-risk alternative for over-managers, unless it licenses avoidance or drift.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: For exhausted over-managers, interventions that suspend self-evaluation and distribute custody to routines, relationships, or environment will outperform reflective review prompts on rumination and burnout, provided safeguards preserve responsibility.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Some interventions assume the learner or client should monitor, evaluate, and own the change process. Others work by reducing self-management, distributing support, or embedding action in practice without a later audit.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Reflective review prompts help depleted participants as much as no-audit prompts, or no-audit reliably increases avoidance, missed obligations, and helplessness.

exact_claim: The keep, release, embody model silently assumes that the practitioner provisionally owns the method and that there is an after in which custody of the result can be decided. Radical Other Power and practice-realization break those assumptions: in Shinran's jinen honi the practitioner never owns the method, trust, or result, while in Dogen's shusho-itto there is no discrete after outside practice. Therefore the custody model is bounded, and for depleted over-managing people the prompt to decide what to keep, release, or embody can become one more burden.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can identify texts that grant practitioner ownership and discrete completion separately from texts that relocate or refuse those assumptions, and those codes predict held-out warning and repair patterns.

falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: No-audit increases avoidance, helplessness, drift, or missed responsibilities, or the After-Use Check performs equally or better for the depleted cohort.

falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Semi-structured interviews with dual-trained practitioners, asking for concrete student cases rather than abstract agreement.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners comfortably translate all traditions into keep, release, embody without loss, or the differences are fully explained by teacher personality and institutional culture.

These are strong boundary cases against a universal after-use grid, but they do not eliminate all guidance: Shin still has nembutsu, warnings, and entrusting language, and Soto still has zazen, discipline, teacher correction, and conduct.

title: When There Is Nothing To Keep Or Release
unlike_statement: Unlike Shinran's Other Power, Dogen's practice-realization, Pargament's agency styles, burnout rumination literature, and prior Lumenary release and custody models, this idea's possible contribution is an explicit scope test: before applying keep, release, or embody guidance, first ask whether the tradition grants provisional practitioner ownership and a discrete after, and whether the person has enough agency to benefit from a custody prompt.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization, Shinran Other Power, and the Heart Sutra's no-attainment-with-reliance pattern.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Substantially lowers confidence in universal scope. The model can survive as a heuristic only if it first codes whether a tradition permits a separable result and practitioner custody.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases do not merely choose keep, release, or embody. They challenge the assumed sequence: method first, result next, custody afterward. They may relocate custody to practice, vow, text, teacher, sangha, or conduct rather than grant a practitioner a post-use choice.

claim_units: Methods train the practitioner's post-use relation to the method.
The prior confirming, canceling, dissolving model misses possessability and aftermath.
A two-axis model, validates versus undermines, and retained versus abandoned versus embodied, explains post-insight risks and training patterns.
Achievement pressure can turn a released method into a trophy or an embodied method into an endless checklist.
A mature practice includes aftermath instructions.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Education, therapy, coaching, and organizational training.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs that explicitly teach after-use relations for their methods will show better transfer and less dependency, performance identity, or ritualized self-monitoring than programs that only teach the method.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Learning methods also have aftermaths: some drills must be retained, some scaffolds should be removed, and some lessons should become ordinary conduct rather than identity.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: After-use instructions add no predictive value over ordinary practice frequency, teacher quality, or workload conditions, or they increase rumination and dependency.

exact_claim: A mature practice is not finished when it produces insight. It also teaches its post-use relation: whether the method validates or undermines its own way of seeing, and whether the practice should be retained, released, or embodied as ordinary conduct.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can code validates versus undermines and retained versus abandoned versus embodied from instruction passages, then predict held-out warnings, repairs, and verification rules better than tradition label alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Method shape predicts aftermath instruction.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source corpus coding across MN 22, Heart Sutra, Mandukya, Dogen, Shinran, apophatic Christian, Sufi, Advaita, and koan-training sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot agree on the axes, or the axes do not predict held-out warnings better than generic variables such as teacher style, institution, practice intensity, or tradition identity.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Dual-trained practitioners report trophy insight after confirming methods, nihilistic dismissal or premature release after undermining methods, and endless self-performance after embodied methods.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Different method shapes create different post-practice temptations.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Semi-structured practitioner interviews asking for concrete failure and repair cases, not agreement with the model.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners report the same temptation profile across method types, or differences are better explained by personality, trauma history, teacher style, or institutional culture.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Screened perfectionistic practitioners show lower self-scoring and rumination after a brief keep, release, ask, or embody check than after generic journaling, without increased avoidance of duties.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The After-Use Check helps a narrow high-achievement cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small randomized micro-pilot with measures for perfectionism, burnout, rumination, responsibility avoidance, and ordinary conduct.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases rumination, scrupulosity, superiority, avoidance, or workload denial, or generic rest performs equally well.

Human-condition fit is real but narrow: it serves achievement-contingent self-worth, perfectionism, burnout, and compulsive self-improvement among functioning practitioners. title: Method release has a shape
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 22, Wittgenstein's ladder, Smith's Nagarjuna-Wittgenstein therapy, Sells's apophatic unsaying, Dogen's practice-realization, and prior Lumenary after-use models, this idea's possible contribution is a bounded coding rubric that tests whether method type predicts held-out warnings, repairs, and post-insight temptations in achievement-pressured practitioners.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Non-instrumental traditions still prescribe forms, warnings, corrections, ethics, teachers, community standards, and ordinary conduct.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps the status at extended rather than candidate discovery. The model must distinguish no separable self-owned result from no discipline, no effect, or no accountability.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If Eihei Shingi, Soto training, Shinran's cautions against licensed evil, nembutsu practice, and community transmission all function as retained disciplines with real effects, then non-instrumentality is not outside the custody apparatus. It is a different custody location: form-held, vow-held, teacher-held, conduct-held, or community-held.

claim_units: The recent custody apparatus assumes instrumentality: do this, get that, steward the result.
Some practices reject a separable result and therefore fall outside the custody grid.
Dogen's practice-realization makes sitting not a bridge to later enlightenment but the expression of realization itself.
Shinran's Other Power denies practicer calculation and owned efficacy.
The first audit question should be whether the practice claims to make something separable.
The teaching targets achievement-driven people who convert every activity into a scored outcome.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Education, arts, sports, therapy, and management.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: For high performers with achievement-contingent self-worth, bounded autotelic activities with no product to display will reduce self-scoring more than another reflective optimization tool, provided duties and clinical risks are protected.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Some activities are instrumental drills with separable outputs, while others are autotelic practices whose goods are internal to participation and whose correction is carried by form, community, and conduct.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: No-result activities perform no better than ordinary rest, or they reliably increase avoidance, low mood, passivity, or contempt for necessary outcomes.

exact_claim: Before asking what a practice does with authority over its result, ask whether it claims to produce a separable result at all. Custody, release, and correction vocabulary applies only to instrumental practices. Dogen's practice-realization and Shinran's Other Power dissolve the tool frame because sitting or entrusting is not owned as a means to a later product.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Texts and manuals coded as non-instrumental from doctrinal passages will show less result-custody language and more conduct, form, vow, teacher, or community correction language in held-out sources.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The separable-result question is a real scope gate.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source coding of Dogen, Shinran, MN 22, koan curricula, Advaita inquiry, apophatic Christian sources, Sufi fana and baqa, and ritual manuals.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Self-described non-instrumental traditions contain result-custody language as centrally as instrumental traditions, or coders cannot distinguish result refusal from result relocation.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Screened high-achievement participants doing a no-result activity show reduced self-scoring and rumination in the next hour or day compared with metric-free rest or generic mindfulness, without missed duties.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Achievement-driven people benefit from temporary non-result practice.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized micro-pilot with perfectionism, burnout, depression, avoidance, and responsibility checks.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The practice increases avoidance, pointlessness, shame, low mood, missed obligations, or performs no better than ordinary leisure.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Soto and Jodo Shinshu practitioners reject get-result-then-steward language more consistently than Theravada, Advaita, therapy, productivity, or skills-training practitioners, while still naming concrete correction holders.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Practitioners treat the tool frame as a category mistake in some traditions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Dual-trained practitioner interviews asking for failed-student cases and repair instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners across traditions translate their practices comfortably into tool, result, and stewardship language without loss, or differences are fully explained by teacher personality.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a discovery. Publish, if at all, as a scope-gate addendum to the custody and release models.
Cross-index with When There Is Nothing To Keep Or Release, You cannot release what you never held, The Road Must Know Its End, The Method's Reckoning, and Holding Without Owning.

Build a codebook with fields for separable result, instrumentality claim, result custody, correction holder, form holder, conduct holder, support locus, warning, repair, evidence passage, and analyst-frame refusal.
Read non-instrumental ritual theory, autotelic flow literature, MacIntyre on practices, Dogen's Eihei Shingi, Bendowa and Genjokoan, Shinran and Tannisho in stronger translations before public use.

Pilot Do One Thing With No Result only with explicit stops for avoidance, pointlessness, low mood, missed duties, dissociation, mania, addiction withdrawal, trauma activation, severe depression, and clinical distress.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.55 to 0.34. The instrumental versus non-instrumental distinction is old and appears directly in Dogen, Shinran, ritual theory, autotelic activity theory, and prior Lumenary non-ownership audits. The useful extension is narrower: using separable-result as a pre-coding scope gate for Lumenary's custody and release apparatus. Human-condition fit is strong for functioning perfectionists, founders, students, creators, and professionals who convert every activity into proof of worth. It is not for under-motivation, responsibility avoidance, severe depression, dissociation, mania, psychosis, addiction withdrawal, acute crisis, coercive workloads, or people who need concrete completed outcomes restored before resultless practice is safe.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners and scholars say this is already standard as practice-realization, Other Power, autotelic ritual, internal goods, non-attachment, grace, or non-gaining mind, and that the scope gate adds no predictive guidance.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the separable-result question to prevent misguidance, identify where accountability is relocated, and predict when outcome language will harm high-achievement students.
questions: In your tradition, is the practice a means to a separable result, an expression of realization or trust, or something else?
When students treat the practice as a tool for getting something, what goes wrong and how do you repair it?
If the practice is not a tool, where do correction and accountability reside: teacher, text, vow, form, conduct, community, or clinical care?
For achievement-driven people, does no-result practice reduce self-scoring, or does it become avoidance and passivity?

primary_pair: MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta, raft simile, https://obo.genaud.net/dhamma-vinaya/ati/mn/mn.022.than.ati.htm

Dogen shusho itto and Shinran jinen honi, https://global.sotozen-net.or.jp/eng/library/key_terms/pdf/key_terms07.pdf and https://shinranworks.com/hymns-in-japanese/hymns-of-the-dharma-ages/on-jinen-honi/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Non-instrumental self-description does not mean absence of discipline, correction, warnings, institutional form, or effects. Dogen still requires continuous practice, and Shinran still has nembutsu, entrusting, and cautions. The model may confuse no owned result with no practical structure.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit did not read Eihei Shingi, full Bendowa or Genjokoan in Japanese, Shinran's Japanese around jinen and hakarai, Tannisho anti-license passages in Japanese, ritual theory in depth, Aristotle praxis and poiesis sources, or empirical studies of autotelic practice and perfectionism. These are necessary before raising novelty.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is explicitly instrumental: effort with the raft gets one across, then the raft should not be carried. Dogen's shusho itto demolishes the cause-effect separation between practice and realization, while Shinran's jinen honi removes calculation by the practicer and locates efficacy in Other Power. The contrast supports a scope distinction, but not a discovery: the instrumental versus non-instrumental contrast is already structurally visible in the primary texts.

title: Not Every Practice Is a Tool
unlike_statement: Unlike Dogen's practice-realization, Shinran's Other Power, autotelic activity theory, non-instrumental ritual theory, MacIntyre's internal goods, and prior Lumenary non-ownership audits, this idea's possible contribution is a practical scope gate for comparative coding: ask first whether a practice claims to produce a separable result before applying custody, release, or correction vocabulary.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Scrupulosity, moral OCD, and reassurance-seeking practitioners who ask teachers, confessors, peers, or AI systems to hold the gate.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Substantially lowers confidence in external gate recommendations. The model needs a mandatory OCD, scrupulosity, dependency, abuse, and clinical-risk screen before any externally held gate is called safer.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: For these users, moving the gate outside the self may not reduce self-scoring. It can create a reassurance loop, approval dependence, compulsive confession, or family and clergy accommodation. ERP often requires reducing reassurance and learning to tolerate uncertainty, so the apparently safer external gate can be the harmful intervention.

claim_units: A return test should not be recommended until the practice is checked for whether result language is native, permitted, or imported.
The model distinguishes a bypassing state from a compulsive self-scoring state.
The decisive safety variable is who holds the diagnostic gate: self, teacher, peer, clinician, fixed rule, or no diagnostic practice.
Self-administered return attention may help people who use insight or spiritual language to avoid conduct.
For compulsive scorers, self-administered return attention may worsen rumination, self-punishment, and achievement-contingent self-worth.
Oscillators should be classified by current state, not by a stable identity label.
The human-condition target is achievement-contingent self-worth, perfectionism, burnout, and spiritual or reflective avoidance.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Education, performance coaching, and software engineering review systems.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: For high-performing students, athletes, artists, or engineers with achievement-contingent self-worth, fixed-rule or peer-held review gates will reduce rumination and improve follow-through more than repeated private self-evaluation. For avoidant performers, a self-held return check will improve accountability more than resultless rest.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A diagnostic check can be self-held, peer-held, coach-held, rule-held, automated, or suspended. The same check helps avoidant performers face reality and harms compulsive optimizers who convert feedback into proof of worth.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: No interaction appears between user state and gate holder, self-evaluation works equally well for compulsive scorers, or external and automated gates simply move self-worth dependence onto approval, metrics, or tool outputs.

exact_claim: A practice-routing model must decide three things before recommending a return test: whether the practice permits result language, whether the practitioner is presently bypassing or self-scoring, and who should hold the diagnostic gate. Self-administered return attention may help the bypasser who uses insight to avoid conduct. For the compulsive scorer, the gate should be externally held by a teacher, peer, clinician, fixed rule, or replaced by resultless practice. For oscillators, the assignment must be state-level and revisable, not a stable identity label.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coding will show that texts coded as instrumental from doctrinal or instruction passages contain more held-out return, fruit, stewardship, or conduct-test warnings, while Dogen and Shinran-style non-instrumental cases contain more form, vow, no-calculation, or practice-realization correction language.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Result-language permission is a real first gate rather than an analyst's imposed vocabulary.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind coding of Ignatius, MN 22, Dogen Bendowa or Genjokoan, Shinran and Tannisho, Rinzai koan training, apophatic Christian texts, Sufi fana and baqa sources, and modern practice manuals.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot reliably distinguish instrumental from non-instrumental cases, or held-out warning and correction language does not differ after controlling for tradition, teacher style, and institution.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In a screened pilot, bypass-state participants show improved ordinary conduct and reduced avoidance after a return check, while compulsive-scorer participants show more rumination and self-criticism after self-held checks than after fixed-rule, clinician-held, teacher-held, or resultless-practice alternatives.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Gate custody interacts with practitioner state.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized micro-pilot with measures for rumination, self-critical rumination, achievement-contingent self-worth, perfectionism, conduct follow-through, avoidance, burnout, and mood.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Self-held return checks help scorers as much as bypassers, or externally held and fixed-rule gates do not reduce rumination relative to self-held checks.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Within-person diary or EMA data will show the same practitioner moving between bypassing and scoring states across contexts, and state-level routing will predict next-day outcomes better than a one-time trait classification.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Oscillation is state-level and revisable, not a trait label.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week ecological momentary assessment with brief prompts after practice, work review, conflict, and rest periods.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Trait labels predict outcomes as well as state-level data, or people classified as oscillators do not show meaningful within-person switching.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Participants with elevated scrupulosity, OCD reassurance seeking, dependency, or authority-trauma scores will worsen under teacher or peer gate-holding unless the holder follows anti-reassurance and abuse-aware constraints.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: External gate holding is not universally safer.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Screened clinical-adjacent study and practitioner case review with ERP clinicians, spiritual directors, and meditation teachers.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: External gate holding improves these groups without increased reassurance seeking, dependency, fear, or loss of agency.

novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.62 to 0.42. The gate-holder idea is already close to Ignatian discernment, spiritual direction, contemplative adverse-effects support, routine outcome monitoring, guided self-help, Pargament agency styles, and OCD reassurance literature. The surviving contribution is narrower: a Lumenary safety-routing heuristic that combines result-language permission, current bypassing or scoring state, and diagnostic custody. Human-condition fit is real but bounded. It is for functioning high achievers, founders, students, creators, professionals, and spiritual practitioners who either use insight to avoid conduct or convert practice into proof of worth. It is not for acute crisis, mania, psychosis, severe depression, dissociation, trauma activation, addiction withdrawal, coercive workloads, active OCD or scrupulosity reassurance loops, abusive communities, or people without trustworthy support.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say they already use this structure as ordinary spiritual direction, teacher supervision, pastoral discernment, ERP triage, guided self-help, routine outcome monitoring, or adverse-meditation support, and that the Lumenary framing adds no new prediction or repair rule.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the three-gate sequence to prevent a specific failure they previously missed: result-language mismatch, self-held rumination, or unsafe external authority. Support rises if they can predict concrete student failures and choose different repairs from the codebook before seeing outcomes.
questions: When a practitioner misuses insight, reflection, or spiritual language, how do you decide whether they should self-check, report to a guide, follow a fixed rule, stop the practice, or do something resultless?
In concrete failure cases, did external guidance help, or did it become reassurance seeking, approval dependence, spiritual abuse, or more self-monitoring?
Is the question 'does this practice permit result language?' native to your tradition or an analyst's imposition?
Does this three-gate model change how you would route a student, or does it merely rename standard discernment, clinical triage, supervision, and spiritual direction?
For high-achievement practitioners, does the gate reduce self-scoring, or does it become another score? What observable sign tells you the difference?

primary_pair: Ignatius of Loyola, Spiritual Exercises, Annotations 15 and 17 plus Rule 13 for discernment of spirits, https://www.orderofthecommonlife.org/spiritual-exercises-full-text and https://sacred-texts.com/chr/seil/seil78.htm

Shinran, On Jinen Honi, and Dogen shusho itto summary, https://shinranworks.com/hymns-in-japanese/hymns-of-the-dharma-ages/on-jinen-honi/ and https://global.sotozen-net.or.jp/eng/library/key_terms/pdf/key_terms07.pdf
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. External gate holding can mean wise support, coercive authority, reassurance seeking, approval dependence, or institutional abuse. Non-instrumental practice does not mean no correction. Bypasser, scorer, and oscillator are crude state labels unless operationalized with validated measures and concrete behavior markers.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit did not read full Ignatian directorial manuals, contemporary spiritual direction ethics, full Dogen Bendowa or Eihei Shingi, Shinran and Tannisho in Japanese, OCD scrupulosity treatment literature beyond abstracts, or the full measurement-based care and guided self-help literatures. It also needs direct work in perfectionism, achievement-contingent self-worth, and contemplative adverse effects before public practice guidance.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Ignatius already makes gate custody explicit. The exercitant reports movements and thoughts, the director adapts exercises, and disclosure to a confessor or spiritual person breaks the secrecy of deceptive movements. Yet Annotation 15 also limits the director, the guide is not supposed to seize the final choice. Shinran strains the model from the opposite side: jinen honi rejects practicer calculation and warns that even talking about no-working can become another form of working. Dogen also strains the return-test frame because practice and realization are not separated as cause and later product. The candidate's structure is therefore not a discovery at the primary-text level. Its possible contribution is a routing rule for deciding when Ignatian-style disclosure, clinical support, fixed-rule gating, or no-result practice is appropriate.

title: Who Holds The Gate
unlike_statement: Unlike Ignatian spiritual direction, VCE person-centered support, Pargament agency styles, routine outcome monitoring, guided self-help, spiritual bypassing literature, and prior Lumenary return and scope-gate models, this claim says a public practice instruction should pass through three ordered gates: result-language permission, current bypassing versus self-scoring risk, and custody of the diagnostic itself. Its novelty depends on whether that three-gate routing predicts harm, repair, or non-fit better than existing spiritual direction, clinical triage, and contemplative-safety frameworks.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: OCD, scrupulosity, reassurance seeking, abusive authority, and valid solitude.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in any public practice unless the codebook includes clinical exclusions, unsafe-authority detection, anti-reassurance rules, and a valid-solitude option.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The model says a compulsive self-scorer may need a teacher, peer, clinician, or rule to hold the check. In OCD or scrupulosity, the same transfer can become reassurance compulsion. In abusive communities, external holding becomes control. In valid solitude, outside holding can weaken needed self-trust.

claim_units: A humility, release, or return check can become harmful self-scoring.
Failure mode should determine check holder.
Bypassers need conduct accountability more than relief from checking.
Compulsive self-scorers may need the diagnostic held outside the self or suspended.
Oscillators require present-state routing, not fixed type assignment.
The practice is only publishable for a clear cohort: stable high-achievement practitioners harmed by self-scoring.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: High-performing workers whose worth is tied to quality scores will complete more and ruminate less when acceptance criteria or reviewers hold the check, while avoidant workers will need a self-held concrete completion check.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: The post-practice check becomes the post-output quality diagnostic. Depending on failure mode, quality can be held by the worker, a reviewer, acceptance criteria, a release rule, or temporarily not checked.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Generic code review, WIP limits, or ordinary management explain all outcome differences, or holder assignment by failure mode adds no predictive value.

exact_claim: Post-practice checks are not automatically safe. The decisive safety variable is who holds the check today: the practitioner, another person, a rule, ordinary conduct, or no check. Bypassers may need a self-held conduct check, compulsive self-scorers may need external, rule-held, or suspended checking, and oscillators need state-based assignment rather than identity labels.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Compared with external or rule-held conditions, self-held checks increase rumination, shame, comparison, and repeated interpretation, while not improving next-day conduct.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Stable high-achievement practitioners high in achievement-contingent self-worth will fare worse with self-held after-use checks than with externally held, rule-held, or suspended checks.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week randomized pilot using contingencies of self-worth, rumination scales, mood ratings, and concrete duty completion.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Self-held checks reduce rumination and improve conduct as well as or better than external, rule-held, or suspended checks.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In high-bypass, low-self-scoring participants, a single conduct check increases repair behavior and reduces avoidance without increasing shame.

claim_units: More output can conceal avoidance of finishing.
A recorded next action is evidence, not decoration.
Topical exhaustion differs from procedural looping.
Procedural looping is dangerous because each new artifact feels like progress.
Completion, consolidation, or handoff can be the competent next act.
The teaching fits high-achievement overproducers, not under-producers or depressed avoiders.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams with high start rates and low completion rates will reduce duplicate tickets, abandoned drafts, and rework when action-state gates are enforced before new creation.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A frontier becomes a work item with an action-state. New feature or idea creation is blocked when review, merge, audit, consolidation, or handoff is outstanding, unless a re-open rule is explicitly satisfied.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Ordinary WIP limits and Definition of Done explain the gains completely, or action-state gates reduce exploration without improving completion or quality.

exact_claim: A self-correcting practice can fail by producing more to avoid the lower-status work of finishing, merging, consolidating, resting, or handing off. The key distinction is topical exhaustion versus procedural looping past a recorded stop signal. A recorded next action should function as a production gate until it is honored or explicitly revised.

primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Zhuangzi and MN 22 both support release of a tool after its work is done, but they presuppose a real catch or crossing. MN 22 also stresses proper grasp before release, which prevents premature quitting. The Heart Sutra denies attainment while still relying on Prajnaparamita, so no-attainment is not simple inactivity. Dogen strains the model most, because practice and realization are inseparable, which blocks a universal before-and-after completion rule. These primary texts support a scoped after-use discipline, not the broad claim that finishing is always the next virtue.

exact_claim: A serious method should not keep the authority it borrowed to bring a person to insight. The crucial distinction is not whether a tradition confirms or cancels itself, but where the authority goes after the method has done its work: into a claim, a practice, a community, a teacher, a life pattern, or a refusal to claim. This matters for modern people whose worth is tied to performance, because even self-inquiry can become another tool they must master. The better teaching is narrower: do not ask only whether your practice worked. Ask what authority you are still giving it, and whether that authority now serves care, freedom, and truthful action.

primary_pair: Run mode: Critique. Selected because this frontier shows live near-duplicate pressure and two incomplete originality audits; the strongest available move weakens or consolidates rather than adds.

title: The Answer You Keep Finding Is Already Settled
unlike_statement: No unlike statement is available until the originality audit completes.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization, Tannisho Other Power, inherited religion with no discrete threshold, and valid daily repetition without a separable product.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers originality from the proposed 0.62 to about 0.30 and blocks publication as a discovery. It can remain as a safety-oriented coding heuristic.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases refuse the assumed sequence of tool, result, and post-result authority. In Dogen, practice is not merely a ladder to be evaluated afterward. In Tannisho, efficacy is not owned by the practitioner or method. In inherited religion, the authority may be communal and continuous before any explicit insight. In faithful daily repetition, keeping the same form may be obedience or formation rather than self-surveillance.

claim_units: Stage completion is defined by a change in permitted guidance, not merely by a successful experience.
Boundary operation and post-threshold custody should be coded together.
Post-method authority may be retained, released, embodied, externally held, grace-held, vow-held, conduct-held, or refused.
A method can become a private judge for achievement-driven practitioners.

The practice fit is bounded: it targets achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, and perfectionistic self-monitoring, not acute crisis, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, dissociation, or beginners needing simple consistency.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs that explicitly route post-success authority to conduct, reviewer, values, rest, or revised rules should show less self-surveillance, dependency, and ritualized checking than programs that only ask whether the method worked.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A technique that helps a person or team cross a threshold can become a new authority holder after it succeeds. The same structure appears when a therapy tool, productivity method, OKR system, code review rule, or metrics dashboard changes from aid to private judge.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Outcomes are fully explained by alliance, task clarity, dose, manager quality, or generic WIP limits, with no added effect from explicit post-method authority routing.

exact_claim: A practice completes a stage not only by working, but by changing what may guide the next action. The audit variable is a two-axis pair: whether the method validates or undermines its own use, and where post-threshold authority is retained, laid down, embodied, handed to teacher or community, held by grace or vow, or refused as possession. The modern risk is that a once-helpful method becomes a private judge of worth, shame, and self-surveillance.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can code boundary operation from entry or instruction texts and custody from separate passages, then predict held-out warning, verification, reentry, and repair patterns above tradition-label, teacher-style, and clinical-risk baselines.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Boundary operation and custody are separable variables with predictive value.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source codebook, inter-rater reliability, and held-out manual or interview prediction.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot distinguish boundary operation from custody without using the same passages or tradition labels, or predictions vanish when institution, teacher, dose, and risk factors are controlled.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In a screened two-week pilot, high achievement-contingent self-worth participants using the Authority Check report less method-as-judgment language and more concrete next actions than generic journaling controls.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Achievement-contingent practitioners are more likely to convert methods into private judges.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized practice pilot using contingent self-worth, rumination, shame, burnout, and next-day conduct measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases rumination, shame, checking, avoidance, or performs no better than a rest-and-plan prompt.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Teacher-held, vow-held, conduct-held, grace-held, and no-claimant cases generate different repairs after misinterpretation or premature completion.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Different custody holders predict different repair instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Concrete failure-case interviews with Zen, Pure Land, Advaita, Christian apophatic, and therapeutic practitioners.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioner interviews show the same repairs across custody types, or repairs track institution and personality better than custody.

practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the boundary-custody interaction to predict misuses and repairs they would not have predicted from tradition identity, institution, teacher style, or generic safety screening.

primary_pair: MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta raft simile, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html; Heart Sutra no attainment with reliance on prajnaparamita, https://www.fgsitc.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Heart-Sutra-2016.pdf

Dogen Genjokoan practice-realization, https://brightwayzen.org/wp-content/uploads/2014/11/For-BWZ-Chant-Book-Genjokoan.pdf; Tannisho sections 6 and 8, Taitetsu Unno translation, https://nembutsu.cc/buddhism/the-tannisho/tannisho-sections-i-to-x/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Tool, stage, custody, and judge are modern analytic terms. They can distort traditions where practice is expression rather than instrument, where authority never belonged to the practitioner, or where communal, ritual, vow, or grace structures are primary.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit found strong near-neighbors in Smith on Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Sells on apophatic unsaying, Pargament agency and coping styles, spiritual materialism, spiritual bypassing, VCE and Cheetah House adverse meditation support, and multiple prior Lumenary audits. Full source reliability still requires reading upaya scholarship, Zen post-kensho training, Shinran scholarship, spiritual direction ethics, and practitioner manuals in original languages where possible.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is a direct near-neighbor for proper use followed by release, but it also requires right grasp before release. The Heart Sutra denies attainment while retaining reliance and mantra, so undermining a result does not imply abandoning the method. Dogen strains the whole stage-completion frame because practice and realization are not cleanly separable. Tannisho strains practitioner-owned authority because nembutsu is presented as free of self-power and not a good act or practice from the practitioner's side. Together, the primary texts support a scoped coding heuristic, not a discovery-level doctrine.

title: When Tools Become Judges
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 22, Smith, Sells, Pargament, spiritual-materialism warnings, VCE safety work, and prior Lumenary return or custody audits, this idea says that the specific interaction between boundary operation and post-threshold custody should predict when a helpful method becomes guidance, conduct, external accountability, rest, or a private judge of worth. That is a useful synthesis, but the structure is mostly inherited from recent internal records.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Legitimate repetition: liturgy, zazen, nembutsu, deliberate teaching restatement, iterative writing, independent convergence, and hard research that needs multiple framings before the real variable appears.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Keeps novelty low and makes the claim publishable only as a bounded production-control rule. It must include reopen criteria and an exception for distinct testable content.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The model risks treating all restatement as non-release. Some traditions and disciplines use repeated forms because repetition is the practice, trains conduct, or reveals differences not visible in the first pass. In research, repeated independent derivations can increase confidence or uncover subclaims. A gate could suppress anomalies, silence hard work, or become avoidance by people afraid to continue.

claim_units: Repetition of one insight in new words can signal non-release rather than progress.
The current frontier has produced multiple near-duplicate records around validates versus undermines and retained, abandoned, or embodied method.
A repeated internal derivation lowers novelty unless each version adds a distinct testable subclaim.
The correct action is consolidation and a production gate, not another restatement.
A frontier should reopen only with a new source class, anomaly, practitioner challenge, failed merge, executed test, or human override.

Human-condition fit is bounded: this serves high-output overproducers with achievement-contingent self-worth, not depressed under-producers, exhausted people needing rest, precarious workers without control, or ordinary editors refining a real contribution.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams using a duplicate-check gate will show fewer duplicate tickets, fewer parallel drafts of the same argument, shorter review queues, and more completed merges, without fewer genuinely novel tickets.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A repeated idea becomes an issue, ticket, manuscript, or design draft with a recorded next action. Starting a new version is blocked until audit, merge, review, release, or explicit reopen criteria are satisfied.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Generic WIP limits, code review, and ordinary editorial triage explain all benefits, or the gate suppresses legitimate exploratory branches.

exact_claim: Producing the same insight again in new words is not deeper realization when the new version adds no source, anomaly, prediction, or executed test. The method-authority frontier has repeatedly generated the same two-axis result, so the competent next move is consolidation, freezing new generation, and reopening only on a named trigger: new source class, real anomaly, practitioner challenge, failed merge, or the test of whether method-type predicts verification and reentry better than tradition membership.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind readers given title-stripped claims cannot reliably sort them into separate positions and cannot identify a unique falsifiable subprediction in each record.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The eight or more recent method-authority records are near-duplicates rather than distinct discoveries.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Independent clustering of recent Lumenary method-authority records.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Blind readers cluster the records into distinct positions and find unique testable content per record.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: When the engine blocks new generation on frontiers marked audit, merge, consolidate, rest, or handoff, duplicate findings decrease, completed audits and merges increase, and blind novelty ratings do not fall.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: An action-state gate improves recursive originality work.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: A/B scheduler pilot across matched frontiers with duplicate counts, completion rates, and blind novelty ratings.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Duplicate production persists, useful anomalies are suppressed, or novelty and source diversity fall relative to an ungated control.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Screened high-output participants show fewer redundant drafts and more concrete actions after four uses, without higher shame, rumination, or reduced genuinely new work.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Duplicate Check helps high-output overproducers but not under-producers.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week pilot with WIP count, duplicate-output coding, action completion, rumination, shame, burnout, and novelty measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The prompt increases avoidance, shame, or underproduction, or ordinary WIP limits and planning prompts perform equally well.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: After completing the recorded audit or merge, reviewers can tell whether no unmined variable remains or whether a concrete reopen trigger emerges.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Topical exhaustion and procedural looping can be distinguished.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Before-after review of frontier histories after forced completion of outstanding recorded actions.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reviewers cannot distinguish exhausted topics from procedurally stalled topics, or the distinction does not change next-action decisions.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Merge or cross-index with More Is Not The Same As Progress, The Silence Has A Stopping Rule, The Answer You Keep Finding Is Already Settled, and the after-use records.

Implement an action-state gate in the recursive loop before generating on a frontier. Block new findings when recommended_next_action is audit, merge, consolidate, rest, or handoff unless a documented reopen trigger exists.
Define reopen triggers as new source class, genuine anomaly, practitioner challenge, failed merge, executed test with surprising result, or explicit human override.
Run the blind distinct-content coding test on the recent method-authority records before further generation on that frontier.

Pilot The Duplicate Check only with high-output overproducers and screen out severe depression, acute burnout, coercive workload, under-production, shame spirals, and cases where ordinary editorial revision is the real task.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.55 to 0.29. The live insight is a useful recursive application of an already logged Lumenary stopping rule. It should be merged with More Is Not The Same As Progress and The Answer You Keep Finding Is Already Settled. Human-condition fit is real but narrow: high-output researchers, writers, founders, students, and makers whose self-worth depends on continued production. It is not a fit for depressed under-producers, people in acute burnout who need rest, people under coercive workload, early exploratory phases without a real next action, or traditions where repetition is the practice itself.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is ordinary WIP control, saturation judgment, editorial consolidation, publication-ethics hygiene, or supervision, and that the recursive framing adds no operational prediction.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the recursive non-release diagnosis and reopen triggers to reduce duplicate production while preserving anomalies better than ordinary WIP or saturation language.
questions: Is this more than WIP limits, Definition of Done, GTD next action, saturation, and anti-salami publication ethics?

What reopen rule prevents this from freezing fertile hard problems?

primary_pair: MN 22 raft simile, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html; Heart Sutra no attainment with retained reliance, https://www.fgsitc.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Heart-Sutra-2016.pdf

Zhuangzi fish trap and words, https://ctext.org/zhuangzi/what-comes-from-without; Dogen Genjokoan practice-realization, https://brightwayzen.org/wp-content/uploads/2014/11/For-BWZ-Chant-Book-Genjokoan.pdf
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Repetition can be pedagogy, liturgy, daily practice, legitimate revision, independent convergence, or the slow work needed for hard problems. A freezing rule can become avoidance, premature closure, or administrative neatness masquerading as rigor.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The close external sources are Kanban WIP limits, GTD next-action discipline, grounded-theory saturation, Lakatosian progressive versus degenerating research programmes, optimal stopping, escalation of commitment, research waste, salami slicing, publication pressure, and repetitive negative thinking. The audit did not fully read GTD, Lakatos, original Glaser and Strauss, or full rumination monographs, so source reliability should remain moderate-high rather than complete.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 and Zhuangzi support releasing a tool after it has done its work, but both presuppose that the work really has been done. The Heart Sutra keeps reliance after denying attainment, so not every repeated form is clinging. Dogen sharply strains the claim because ongoing expression of realization can require repeated practice without a separate product. Primary texts therefore support a narrow anti-duplication rule only where a restatement adds no new source, anomaly, prediction, or conduct change.

title: Restating Is Not Realizing
unlike_statement: Unlike Kanban WIP limits, GTD, theoretical saturation, Lakatosian degeneration, salami slicing, rumination research, and the prior Lumenary More Is Not The Same As Progress record, this idea's distinct claim is that a method studying post-method release can itself fail to release by repeatedly restating its own result. That recursive mirror is rhetorically sharp, but the operational rule is mostly already known.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: A depleted person with achievement-contingent self-worth who improves only after a structured review, external accountability, or clinician-supported rule, while a no-audit prompt increases avoidance or helplessness.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence from moderate to cautious. The claim should remain a fit rule until pilots and practitioner interviews distinguish burdening review from supportive structure.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The idea assumes that private review is often the burden for depleted over-managers. If structure and review are the relieving container, then the model confuses over-management with the absence of safe holding. It also fails if Other Power, Dogen practice-realization, or community-held practice includes rigorous review, conduct correction, and formal repetition without harming agency.

claim_units: Help can be damaged by being turned into a project of private management.
Practice-ending or after-use review has preconditions: provisional method ownership, completion temporality, and available agency.
Where these preconditions fail, custody should be relocated to forms such as community, vow, conduct, rest, teacher, or ordinary support.
The main human-condition fit is depleted over-managers with burnout, compulsive self-monitoring, or achievement-contingent self-worth.
The idea is a scoped contraindication to recent Lumenary after-use and method-authority practices, not a universal doctrine.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: For burned-out high performers, skipping or externally holding some retrospectives will reduce redundant self-critique and improve follow-through compared with mandatory self-review, while teams with clear accountability needs will still benefit from structured review.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A tool that helped produce work should not automatically become another self-management loop. Before a retrospective, postmortem, or optimization review, check whether the worker owns the lever, whether there is a real after-action moment, and whether the person has enough agency for the review to improve action rather than increase self-surveillance.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Ordinary workload, leadership quality, psychological safety, and planning explain all effects, or no-audit policies mainly increase drift, missed obligations, and uncorrected errors.

exact_claim: Some forms of help are distorted when the practitioner converts them into another private management task. An after-use review should be prescribed only if three fit conditions hold: the path permits provisional method use, the path names a later moment where a result can be handled, and the person has enough spare agency for review to help rather than add burden. If any condition fails, help may need to be carried by practice, community, vow, rest, ordinary conduct, teacher, or external support without another private audit.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Split-source coding of primary manuals will show that traditions without practitioner-owned result or discrete after have different warning, verification, and repair patterns than traditions that permit method-use and later handling.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Ownership, completion temporality, and spare agency are real fit variables for after-use practices.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pre-registered comparative codebook with held-out manual warnings and practitioner interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cleanly apply keep, release, and embody axes across Shinran, Dogen, Heart Sutra, MN 22, and apophatic sources without distortion, and the three fit variables do not predict held-out warnings or repairs.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In a two-week pilot, screened over-managers using the No-Audit Check show lower rumination, lower self-surveillance, and no increase in missed duties compared with a structured after-use review group.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: No-audit permission helps depleted over-managers more than ordinary after-use review.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized low-risk pilot with burnout, rumination, self-worth contingency, action completion, and adverse-effect measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: No-audit increases avoidance, helplessness, shame, missed obligations, or performs no better than simple rest or planning.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Participants with high reflective compulsion benefit more than under-reflectors, grievers, people needing accountability, or people under material overload.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The practice is cohort-specific, not universal.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Moderator analysis in pilot data plus practitioner triage interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Benefits are not moderated by over-management, or the practice harms the target cohort as much as non-fit groups.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Manuals that deny self-ownership still name alternative holders such as vow, grace, teacher, conduct, sangha, scripture, ritual, or ordinary duty, and those holders predict repair advice.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Custody relocation is distinguishable from refusal of management.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Manual coding and concrete failed-student interview cases.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: No stable custody-holder patterns appear, or practitioner repairs do not track holder type.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Cross-index with When There Is Nothing To Keep Or Release, When Tools Become Judges, Who Holds The Gate, Not Every Check Should Be Yours, and Keep What Can Correct You.
Build the three-condition fit gate as a codebook: provisional ownership, completion temporality, and spare agency, with explicit alternative holders and contraindications.
Use split-source coding: code ownership and temporality from entry or doctrinal passages, then predict held-out warnings, repairs, and verification from manuals or concrete practitioner cases.
Run a small No-Audit Check pilot only with screened over-managers. Track rumination, self-surveillance, shame, avoidance, missed duties, and ordinary action within one hour.
Interview practitioners for concrete harm and repair cases rather than abstract agreement. Include clinicians so clinical reassurance seeking and avoidance are not spiritualized.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.36 to 0.31. The contribution is a useful scoped fit gate, but it heavily overlaps prior Lumenary holder-routing records, Pargament agency styles, ACT, rumination and self-focused attention research, Buddhist non-grasping, apophatic unsaying, and meditation-safety routing. Publishability should remain modest until the model shows predictive gain over ordinary discernment, spiritual direction, ACT, and clinical triage. Human-condition fit is clear but narrow: burned-out over-managers, compulsive self-monitors, and people with achievement-contingent self-worth. It is not for under-reflectors, acute grief, crisis, severe depression, dissociation, mania, addiction withdrawal, abusive authority contexts, or cases needing accountability and material help.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say they already route practice review by readiness, tradition, capacity, scrupulosity, teacher authority, and clinical risk, and that the three-part gate adds no new decision power.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the three fit conditions to predict when after-use review harms, name the correct holder of help, and design different repair paths than generic reflection, spiritual direction, or ACT language would provide.
questions: Is the three-part gate more than ordinary discernment about fit, agency, spiritual direction, and clinical contraindication?
Can you describe a concrete case where asking someone to review a helpful practice made the burden worse?
Can you describe a case where refusing review became avoidance, helplessness, or neglect of duty?
In your tradition or field, who or what holds correction when the practitioner should not privately manage the result?
Would this rubric change screening, sequencing, or repair instructions, or merely rename what teachers already do?
