primary_pair: MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta raft simile, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html; Heart Sutra, https://www.fgsitc.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Heart-Sutra-2016.pdf

Dogen practice-realization sources such as Bendowa or Genjokoan; Shinran and Tannisho Other Power sources, including https://shinranworks.com/commentaries/notes-on-once-calling-and-many-calling/ and Tannisho chapter 8 translations.
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Some people harmed by over-management still need structure, accountability, clinical care, concrete help, or community obligations. A tradition may reject self-owned merit while retaining concrete forms of practice, conduct, teacher correction, and institutional discipline. Calling this non-management can hide a transfer of management to another holder.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit still needs direct term-level work on Shinran's jinen honi and hakarai, Dogen's shusho-itto or practice-realization, apophatic unsaying, spiritual direction ethics, and ACT or CBT literature on self-monitoring. Source reliability is adequate for lowering novelty, not for promoting the model as a discovery.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 supports a tool-use and non-clinging pattern: a teaching can be used for crossing and then not possessed. The Heart Sutra strains a simple release rule because it denies attainment while preserving reliance on prajnaparamita. Dogen-style practice-realization strains it further because practice is not merely an instrument awaiting later review. Shinran Other Power also resists practitioner-owned handling because merit and final efficacy are not primarily self-managed. The candidate's strongest move is not method-release, which is old, but the fit gate that asks whether ownership, temporality, and available agency exist before prescribing review.

title: Some Help Should Not Be Managed
unlike_statement: Unlike Pargament's agency styles, ACT's critique of internal control, Buddhist non-grasping, apophatic unsaying, Cheetah House safety routing, and prior Lumenary correction-holder records, this idea says that after-use review itself should be blocked unless three fit conditions are present: provisional ownership, a permitted after, and spare agency. That is useful, but mostly an extension of known parts.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: A reflective person in grief, moral repair, trauma integration, or non-instrumental practice who is harmed by stopping on schedule because the timer becomes avoidance, emotional bypassing, or a new compulsive ritual.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in broad teaching status but preserves the model as a narrow practice-fit rule for screened over-reflectors.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The model depends on the problem being over-reflection in search of certainty. In grief, confession, repair, trauma integration, or practice-realization, the needed process may be spacious, relational, recurring, or embodied rather than closed for the day by a timer. A timer may also become the reassurance ritual that ERP would target.

claim_units: Some reflective practices lack a reliable natural terminus.
For compulsive over-reflectors, felt resolution can be an unreliable and self-perpetuating completion criterion.
A precommitted external limit, time or one concrete act, should close reflection for the day.
Continuing past the chosen limit is often avoidance, reassurance seeking, or perfectionism disguised as diligence.
The rule is contraindicated for under-reflection, acute grief, trauma processing, moral repair, clinical obsessive doubt without support, and non-instrumental practice-realization traditions.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: On low-risk tasks, timeboxed review with a written stop rule will reduce churn, duplicate comments, and reopened decisions without reducing defect detection compared with review-until-satisfied.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A review or refactor can lack a natural internal feeling of done. For perfectionistic teams or individuals, completion should be defined by a precommitted timebox, acceptance criterion, or one bounded action, not by the feeling that the design is finally clean.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Defects increase, useful design concerns are suppressed, or ordinary issue scoping and Definition of Done explain all observed benefits.

exact_claim: Some reflective work has no natural internal end, especially for people prone to compulsive self-examination, perfectionism, or achievement-contingent self-worth. For those cases, completion should be defined before starting by an external limit, such as a fixed time or one bounded action, and the question should close for the day even if it does not feel resolved. A method has surrendered its hold when the practitioner can stop on schedule, not when reflection finally feels complete.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A fixed-time or one-act close reduces same-day reopening, rumination, self-worth distress, and redundant journaling compared with reflect-until-resolved instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: For compulsive over-reflectors, external limits outperform felt-resolution stopping.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized two-week pilot with screened over-reflectors, daily logs, rumination scales, distress ratings, and action-completion measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The external limit performs no better, increases anxiety, becomes a ritual, or reduces responsible action.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: High-rumination and high-perfectionism participants benefit more than under-reflectors, grievers, and avoidant participants.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The benefit is moderated by failure mode.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Moderator analysis comparing over-reflection, avoidance, grief, and perfectionism profiles.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The timer helps equally across groups, or mainly helps by ordinary scheduling rather than by reducing compulsive resolution seeking.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: People who endlessly edit adequate documents, plans, or designs complete more work with bounded stopping rules, without lower blind quality ratings.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The same structure travels to non-introspective over-refinement.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Writing, planning, or design experiment with blind quality ratings and revision-count metrics.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Quality drops sharply, avoidance rises, or ordinary deadlines explain all benefits.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Teachers in non-instrumental traditions report that a timed close may be useful for session discipline but does not mark existential completion or method surrender.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Practice-realization and other non-instrumental contexts are true scope exceptions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Practitioner interviews with Soto Zen, Dzogchen, liturgical, and devotional teachers.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Such practitioners endorse the timer as a valid completion criterion for the practice's core aim.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Cross-index with More Is Not The Same As Progress, Restating Is Not Realizing, The Silence Has A Stopping Rule, Not Every Check Should Be Yours, and The Answer You Keep Finding Is Already Settled.
Rewrite as a bounded practice-fit protocol for over-reflection, not as a general teaching about method surrender.
Add a triage gate before the practice: over-reflection versus avoidance, grief, moral repair, trauma, OCD or scrupulosity, and non-instrumental practice.

Compare directly against mood-as-input stop-rule training, ERP response prevention, rumination-focused CBT, metacognitive therapy, timeboxing, WIP limits, implementation intentions, and ordinary journaling limits.
Pilot only with screened non-clinical over-reflectors. Track reopening frequency, anxiety, ritualization, avoidance, shame, action completion, and whether the closing act becomes compulsive.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.55 to 0.24. The narrow contribution is a spiritual framing of established stop-rule, ERP, rumination, and timeboxing principles. The strongest close neighbor is mood-as-input stop-rule research, which already attacks felt completion as a dangerous stopping criterion. Human-condition fit is strong for perfectionists, chronic self-improvers, over-journalers, and achievement-contingent over-reflectors. It is not for acute grief, trauma processing, moral repair, clinical OCD or scrupulosity without trained care, under-reflection, coercive workload, or non-instrumental practice where timed stopping would distort the aim.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Clinicians and teachers say this is standard stop-rule work, response prevention, postponement, timeboxing, or journaling hygiene, and that the spiritual-method framing adds no new screening or prediction.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners find that the model reliably identifies a neglected failure mode: people understand release intellectually but keep applying release-instructions compulsively, and a bounded external close helps where insight-based advice fails.
questions: Is this more than mood-as-input stop-rule training, ERP response prevention, uncertainty tolerance, rumination-focused CBT, or ordinary timeboxing?
How would you distinguish an over-reflector helped by a timer from an avoidant person using the timer to evade honesty?
When does stopping on time become a new compulsion or reassurance ritual?
In your practice context, does a timed close mark completion, or only a practical boundary around a session?
What concrete failure cases would make you forbid this practice or require clinician involvement?

primary_pair: Wittgenstein, Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus 6.54, ladder image, https://www.gutenberg.org/files/5740/5740-h/5740-h.htm; MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta raft simile, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html
Heart Sutra, https://www.fgsitc.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Heart-Sutra-2016.pdf; Dogen practice-realization sources such as Bendowa or Genjokoan.
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High in clinical, grief, trauma, and moral-repair contexts. A timer can become reassurance, ritual, avoidance, or self-punishment. The model can mistake legitimate repeated practice, mourning, confession, discernment, and non-instrumental sitting for compulsive reopening. It should be framed as a triage rule for a specific failure mode, not as a general spiritual law.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The strongest near-neighbors are not only spiritual texts but clinical and cognitive stop-rule literatures. The audit needs full reading in mood-as-input studies, ERP manuals, intolerance-of-uncertainty protocols, rumination-focused CBT, metacognitive therapy, implementation intentions, and timeboxing research. It also needs practitioner checks from Zen and other non-instrumental practice contexts.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Tractatus 6.54 and MN 22 both picture a method that should not be retained as an object after it has served its function. Neither source gives a modern behavioral stopping rule for a person whose compulsion is to keep checking whether they have really let go. The Heart Sutra complicates discard language because it negates attainment while preserving reliance. Dogen complicates it more sharply because practice may not be an instrument whose completion is externally marked. The candidate's distinct structural claim is not self-canceling method, which is old, but the external terminus for people whose inner completion signal is unreliable.

title: Stop When Time Is Up, Not When It Feels Done
unlike_statement: Unlike mood-as-input stop-rule research, obsessive-compulsive stopping-criteria studies, ERP, rumination therapies, timeboxing, implementation intentions, WIP limits, and prior Lumenary stopping-rule records, this idea says that self-canceling spiritual instructions fail for over-reflectors unless completion is moved outside felt resolution into a precommitted clock or bounded act. That combination is usable, but the mechanism is mostly already known.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Objectless-sleep interviews that initially look transparent but, under micro-phenomenological probing, show minimal self, indeterminate location, agency, emotion, or modality-like content.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers originality and confidence. The model remains useful as a claim-routing rule, but not as evidence that transparent gaps exist.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If transparency reports are edge reconstruction or subtly contentful states, the opacity versus transparency split may track doctrinal framing and interview style rather than a real phenomenological class.

claim_units: Post-gap report grammar assumes the gap is opaque and evidence appears at the edges.
Advaita, Yoga, Tibetan sleep-yoga, and some objectless-sleep reports claim awareness within the apparent gap.
Early Buddhist cessation and not-self sources resist turning gap reports into a witness claim.
Opacity versus claimed transparency is upstream of clause-level report grammar.
The teaching fit is discontinuity anxiety, but it must not turn uncertainty into metaphysical reassurance or rumination.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Anesthesia, fainting, blackout, and near-sleep medical reports
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: A pre-coded opacity versus claimed-transparency distinction should predict which people turn a blank into nonexistence anxiety, continuity reassurance, or overconfident memory claims.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: After an interval with no ordinary memory, people either infer from edges, rely on external records, or claim some internal continuity.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: External medical records and general anxiety explain the reports completely, with no stable opacity or transparency grammar.

exact_claim: Report-grammar analysis applies only after a prior routing question: does the source treat the gap as opaque and knowable from its edges, or as claimed-transparent with awareness said to span the gap? Conflating these classes creates false convergence.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Witnessing-sleep or clear-light practitioners produce more in-gap presence claims under neutral interviews, while cessation or not-self practitioners produce more edge, transition, and non-appropriation reports.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Training background should shape report class before clause-level grammar is analyzed.

primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Brihadaranyaka 4.3.23 asserts that the seer does not cease in deep sleep, with non-seeing explained by absence of a second object. SN 22.59 applies not-self to consciousness, AN 9.34 names peace through the absence of felt experience, and MN 44 says no thought of I am attaining or emerging occurs in cessation. The candidate correctly identifies two incompatible evidential postures, but the structural split is already central to the classical Indian debate and recent dreamless-sleep research.

title: Not Every Blank Is an Absence
unlike_statement: Unlike Thompson, Windt, Alcaraz-Sanchez, classical Advaita and Buddhist sources, and prior Lumenary gap-report work, this idea says the first audit question is whether a gap is being treated as opaque or claimed-transparent before report grammar is coded. That is a useful extension, not a discovery.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Valid solitude or direct recognition with stable ethical fruit, plus cases where external correction is abusive, shaming, or dependency-producing.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers originality and practice confidence. The model survives only as a routing heuristic for isolated, stable practitioners, not as a general spiritual law.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If some practitioners integrate silence well without a named external corrector, or if correction often makes them more dependent and ashamed, then correctability cannot be the threshold for evidential use. It becomes one possible safeguard among others.

claim_units: Silence after practice is not proof of Self, no-self, or attainment by itself.
The later story must be overridable by an accepted correction process before it is trusted.
The key question is not only what remained, but who or what may overrule the returned interpretation.
This is aimed at isolated practitioners who turn private silence into identity, certainty, doubt, or despair.
Correction can also harm when the corrector is abusive, incompetent, or clinically mismatched.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Scientific and organizational decision making after private insight
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams that require investigators to name the review, replication, user evidence, or failure metric that can overrule a cherished insight will show fewer overclaimed conclusions and fewer stalled projects than teams relying on intuitive certainty.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A compelling insight, model, or diagnosis is not evidence until an accepted correction process can revise it.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Ordinary peer review, project maturity, or leadership quality explains all improvement, and pre-naming correctors adds no independent value.

exact_claim: A silence after self-questioning practice becomes usable evidence only when the later report can be corrected by something the practitioner accepts, such as teacher, text, vow, community, clinician, or visible conduct.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can identify teacher, text, vow, community, clinician, conduct, or no-corrector from one source layer and predict held-out warnings or repairs better than tradition label alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Correction holder is an independently codable variable, not just a restatement of doctrine.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source primary-text and manual coding across Upanishadic, Theravada, Zen, Tibetan, Christian, and Sufi sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot identify correctors without outcome passages, or tradition label explains warnings and repairs equally well.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable solo practitioners who use the Correction Partner Note show less identity inflation and fewer certainty-doubt swings than ordinary journaling controls.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Naming an accepted corrector helps the target cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week low-risk pilot with solo meditators and app users, excluding crisis, psychosis, mania, dissociation, severe depression, and destabilizing meditation effects.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The practice increases shame, dependency, rumination, isolation, or performs no better than rest and ordinary conversation.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Advaita, Dzogchen, Zen, and apophatic sources that speak of direct recognition still point to conduct, teacher verification, scripture, vows, lineage, compassion, or ordinary functioning as later constraints.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Traditions that claim direct recognition still retain some corrective channel.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Close reading plus practitioner interviews asking for concrete misrecognition and repair cases.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Mature sources explicitly authorize private recognition with no teacher, text, conduct, or communal check, and practitioners show stable integration without such checks.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In meditation-related challenge cases, outcomes improve when appraisal is paired with fitting support, not merely with a spiritual or clinical label.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Support routing matters more than the initial label after difficult practice experiences.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Retrospective VCE-style case coding and prospective support-routing pilot.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Clinical-risk variables explain outcomes completely, or correction-holder naming adds no value beyond standard triage.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Merge or cross-index with Keep What Can Correct You, Every Insight Has An Appeal Court, A Practice Cannot Name Itself, and correction-holder audits.
Build a correction-holder codebook with values for teacher-held, text-held, vow-held, community-held, conduct-held, clinician-held, valid-solitude, unsafe-authority, no-corrector, and undecidable.
Use split-source coding: code the post-gap claim and correction holder from separate passages, then predict held-out warnings, repairs, and conduct tests.
Run practitioner interviews for concrete misnaming, failed correction, abusive correction, and healthy solitude cases, not abstract agreement.

Pilot The Correction Partner Note only with screened stable solo practitioners, with explicit stops for shame, dependency, paranoia, rumination, dissociation, mania, severe depression, and destabilizing meditation effects.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.56 to 0.24. The claim is a clear, useful restatement of prior Lumenary correction-holder work and close external near-neighbors in Ignatian discernment, James, Proudfoot, Sharf, Asad, Lindbeck, Alston, and VCE safety literature. Human-condition fit is strong but narrow: isolated stable practitioners facing loneliness, meaning loss, and unsupported interpretation after unusual quiet. It is not for acute crisis, psychosis, mania, paranoia, dissociation, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, fresh grief, abusive communities, or cases needing medical or clinical care.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is standard spiritual direction, fruits testing, teacher verification, lineage grammar, or meditation-safety triage, and that the new language adds no prediction.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use the correctable-return rule to identify unsupported post-gap overclaim earlier than existing language, and it predicts concrete repair paths for solo practitioners.

SN 22.59 and MN 44, plus Ignatius, Spiritual Exercises, Rules for Discernment, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN44.html, https://sacred-texts.com/chr/seil/seil79.htm
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can smuggle modern accountability into traditions that claim immediate recognition. It can also romanticize correction despite abusive teachers, doctrinal policing, dependency, scrupulosity, paranoia, and clinical crises. The human fit is loneliness and meaning loss among stable solo practitioners, not acute distress or destabilizing meditation effects.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Read Proudfoot on religious experience attribution, Sharf on experience and Buddhist modernism, Katz and Taves on interpretation, Asad and Lindbeck on tradition and grammar, Alston on doxastic practice and defeaters, VCE literature on appraisal and support, spiritual direction ethics, abuse literature, and clinical material on meditation-related adverse effects.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The Upanishadic passages protect an unobjectifiable knower, but they do so through teaching, dialogue, hearing, reflection, and discipline. SN 22.59 corrects consciousness-as-self by applying not-self to all aggregates, and MN 44 corrects self-appropriation in cessation by describing trained process rather than ownership. Ignatian rule 8 is an especially close Christian primary neighbor: even a high consolation requires later opinions to be examined before full credit or action. The candidate's correction threshold is structurally old.

title: Silence Needs Correction
unlike_statement: Unlike Ignatian discernment, Jamesian fruits, Proudfoot, Sharf, Asad, Lindbeck, Alston, VCE safety work, and prior Lumenary correction-holder records, this idea says that post-self-questioning silence should not count as usable evidence unless a named accepted corrector can overrule the returned interpretation. The narrowing is useful, but the structure is mostly renamed prior art.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Advaita-style inference from absence, where the absence of objects in deep sleep is used to argue for unlost witnessing, rather than being sorted as either absence or remembered in-gap awareness.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers novelty and lowers confidence in the two-way fork. Raises confidence in a three-way coding protocol.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: It shows that the binary is too clean. A report can be phenomenologically opaque but doctrinally used as evidence for presence. That means the prior variable may be not absence versus awareness, but report source: edge inference, in-gap memory claim, or training-fruit verification.

claim_units: The word blank hides at least two report types: no-memory absence and remembered bare awareness.
The absence-or-awareness fork is prior to correction, residue, and report-clause gates.
Collapsing the two reports feeds opposite errors: I vanished, or I found an indestructible self.
The proposed practice asks stable practitioners to sort the blank and suspend identity verdicts.
The human-condition fit is discontinuity anxiety, fear of sleep or death, and solitary inflation of empty states.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Anesthesia, fainting, blackout, and other medically cleared gaps
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: A pre-coded absence versus awareness versus external-record distinction should predict whether people develop nonexistence anxiety, continuity reassurance, or overconfident memory claims.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: After an interval without ordinary memory, people infer from edges, rely on external evidence, or claim some form of inner continuity.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: General anxiety, medical history, and external records explain the reports completely, with no added value from the gap-report distinction.

exact_claim: Before applying post-gap evidence gates, first distinguish a memoryless absence from a remembered bare awareness, because the two report types carry different evidential risks and produce different identity errors.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Neutral interviewers can sort reports into no-memory absence and remembered bare awareness with acceptable inter-rater reliability before doctrinal labels are introduced.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The absence-or-awareness fork is an independently usable prior variable.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind-coded micro-phenomenological interviews with Advaita, Tibetan sleep-yoga, Theravada, and untrained participants.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reports collapse into mixed, indeterminate, or interviewer-shaped categories, or coders need doctrinal outcome passages to classify them.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A stable subgroup of trained practitioners reports sparse but consistent in-gap awareness features under serial awakenings and careful follow-up.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Remembered bare-awareness reports are not just waking-edge reconstruction.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Sleep-lab serial awakening study with polysomnography, immediate reports, and blinded phenomenological coding.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The reports map mainly to sleep-state misperception, prompt effects, white dreams, memory reconstruction, or subtle ordinary content.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Screened adults with discontinuity anxiety show fewer catastrophic or grand identity verdicts after the Name the Blank practice than after ordinary journaling or sleep education alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The fork helps the target human problem rather than intensifying rumination.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Low-risk pilot excluding dissociation, trauma amnesia, panic disorder, psychosis, mania, substance blackout, and unexplained loss of consciousness.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The practice increases derealization, sleep fear, obsessive checking, or performs no better than ordinary reassurance.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders distinguish inferred-from-absence, claimed-in-gap awareness, and verified-by-training or fruit across Brihadaranyaka, Yoga, Tibetan, MN 44, AN 9.34, and SN 22.59 sources.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Primary texts support a prior routing distinction.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source textual coding using multiple translations and original-language checks.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The two-way or three-way categories cannot be coded without later commentary or tradition labels.

primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before public use, read Evan Thompson on Advaita and Nyaya dreamless sleep, Windt, Nielsen, and Thompson on dreamless-sleep experience, Alcaraz-Sanchez on micro-phenomenology of conscious dreamless sleep, Yoga Sutra 1.10 commentaries on sleep as absence-based vritti, Tibetan clear-light sleep manuals, and sleep-state misperception literature.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Brihadaranyaka 4.3.23 protects an unlost seer when no second object appears, which is not simply a remembered in-gap experience. It is closer to a doctrinal and inferential witness claim. MN 44 describes cessation through prior training and emergence, not through a private self-report of awareness inside the gap. AN 9.34 treats cessation as known through discernment and fruit. SN 22.59 blocks turning consciousness into owner. A three-way codebook, inferred-from-absence, claimed-in-gap awareness, and verified-by-training or fruit, fits the sources better than the candidate's two-way fork.

title: Were You Absent, or Were You Aware?
unlike_statement: Unlike Thompson, Windt, Alcaraz-Sanchez, classical dreamless-sleep debates, and prior Lumenary gap-report work, this idea says the first practitioner-facing audit question should be: was this a no-memory absence or a remembered bare awareness? That simplification is useful, but the structure is mostly renamed prior art.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Direct recognition, clear-light sleep, or stable solitary realization cases where mature practitioners report immediate knowing with ethical integration and no explicit return-discipline gate, plus the opposite anomaly of abusive or compulsive correction.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers novelty and practice confidence. The model survives as a narrow safety-routing heuristic for isolated overinterpreters and achievement-contingent practitioners, not as a general doctrine.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If some mature sources and practitioners treat silence or recognition as self-evident in a bounded way, the claim that no silence proves itself is too broad. If correction commonly produces shame, dependence, or coercion, return discipline cannot be presented as a universal first layer.

claim_units: Silence, blankness, or quiet is not self-authenticating evidence of Self, no-self, attainment, worth, or failure.
Brihadaranyaka and early Buddhist texts disagree about what remains after negation, but both require more than private blankness alone.
Return discipline, instruction, correction, conduct, and ordinary duty, should be the first audit layer.
The target cohort is stable self-directed practitioners and high-striving people who convert inner states into worth verdicts.
The proposed practice delays self, no-self, attainment, failure, and worth claims for twenty-four hours.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Scientific, clinical, and organizational decision making after private insight
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams or clinicians that require a named return check before acting on a private insight will show fewer overclaimed conclusions, fewer avoidant delays, and fewer identity-protective interpretations than groups relying on intuitive certainty alone.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A compelling private perception, hunch, model, or diagnosis is not enough until it returns through review, consequence, replication, patient or user outcome, or ordinary duty.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Ordinary peer review, supervision, leadership quality, or case complexity explains all improvement, and pre-naming the return check adds no independent value.

exact_claim: A silence or blank state cannot authorize its own meaning; the trustworthy evidence is in the disciplined return: prior instruction, correction after the event, visible conduct, and care for remaining duties and relationships.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can identify instruction-before, correction-after, conduct-test, relationship-duty, or no-return-discipline from one source layer and predict held-out warnings or repairs better than tradition label alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Return discipline is an independently codable variable, not just a restatement of tradition identity.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source coding across Upanishadic, Theravada, Zen, Tibetan, Christian, Sufi, and modern meditation-safety sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders need outcome passages to identify return discipline, or tradition label and teacher style predict warnings equally well.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable participants using Return Without Verdict show fewer worth verdicts, shame swings, certainty inflation, and post-state rumination than ordinary journaling or rest-and-plan controls.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The practice helps achievement-contingent overinterpreters.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week pilot with screened self-directed practitioners, students, caregivers, and professionals high in perfectionism or achievement-contingent self-worth.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The practice increases rumination, derealization, shame, dependency, avoidance, or performs no better than controls.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Advaita, Dzogchen, Zen, and apophatic sources that speak strongly about immediate recognition still retain some constraint through teacher, text, lineage, vow, conduct, compassion, or ordinary functioning.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Even direct-recognition traditions preserve return constraints.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Close reading plus practitioner interviews asking for concrete misrecognition, warning, and repair cases.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Mature sources explicitly authorize private silence as sufficient warrant with no correction, conduct, lineage, or aftercare, and practitioners show stable integration without those constraints.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Meditation-related challenge cases improve when interpretation is paired with fitting teacher, community, clinical, or conduct support, rather than relying on spiritual or clinical labeling alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Support routing matters more than the first label applied to a difficult blank state.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Retrospective VCE-style case coding and a prospective support-routing pilot.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Clinical-risk variables explain outcomes completely, or return-discipline naming adds no value beyond standard triage.

Pilot Return Without Verdict only with screened stable overinterpreters and stop for rumination, shame, derealization, dependency, avoidance, dissociation, mania, depression, addiction withdrawal, trauma activation, or medical concern.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.42 to 0.18. The teaching is clear and potentially useful, but it is a renamed synthesis of prior Lumenary correction and return records plus close external near-neighbors in Ignatian discernment, James, Alston, Buddhist not-self inspection, and VCE safety literature. Human-condition fit is strong but narrow: stable self-directed practitioners with achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, loneliness, or isolated overinterpretation after quiet states. It is not for trauma amnesia, dissociation, panic disorder, psychosis, mania, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, unexplained loss of consciousness, medical or legal reconstruction, abusive authority contexts, or people already under competent guidance.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say the rule is standard spiritual direction, fruits testing, lineage verification, Buddhist non-appropriation, or VCE-style support routing, and that the new wording adds no prediction.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can use return-discipline language to identify overinterpretation earlier, route high-striving practitioners away from worth verdicts, and specify when teacher, text, clinician, conduct, rest, or no-practice is the right holder.

SN 22.59, SN 22.95, MN 44, and Ignatius, Spiritual Exercises Rule 8, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_95.html, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN44.html, https://sacred-texts.com/chr/seil/seil79.htm
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The claim can flatten direct-recognition traditions, overvalue external correction, or convert solitude into suspicion. Correction can be abusive, shaming, dependency-producing, clinically mismatched, or compulsive. The achievement-contingent self-worth practice may help overinterpreters, but can harm people with OCD, scrupulosity, dissociation, mania, severe depression, trauma activation, addiction withdrawal, or genuine medical blackout.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Read William James and Edwards on fruits and practice, Ignatian discernment and spiritual direction ethics, Alston on mystical doxastic practice and overriders, Proudfoot, Sharf, Katz, Taves, Asad, Lindbeck, VCE meditation-challenge work, Cheetah House materials, rumination and scrupulosity literature, and burnout and perfectionism literature before any public practice.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Brihadaranyaka does not let the blank speak by itself. It frames the witness through teaching, hearing, reflection, meditation, and metaphysical instruction. SN 22.59 and SN 22.95 refuse ownership of consciousness and train inspection of aggregates rather than trust in blankness. MN 44 treats cessation through prior development, ordered emergence, and post-emergence orientation. Ignatius Rule 8 is an exact Christian near-neighbor: even high consolation requires later opinions and resolutions to be examined before full credit or action. The candidate's return-discipline rule is structurally old.

title: No Silence Proves Itself
unlike_statement: Unlike Silence Needs Correction, Ignatian discernment, Jamesian fruits, Alstonian overriders, VCE support routing, and prior Lumenary return-test records, this idea says a blank should be judged first by the ecology of return, especially for people who turn inner quiet into a worth verdict. The cohort narrowing is useful, but the core claim is mostly renamed prior art.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Active scrupulosity or OCD where the trusted helper becomes a reassurance object, plus spiritual-abuse contexts where external custody becomes control.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence substantially. The model needs hard exclusions and a distinction between bounded support, reassurance accommodation, clinical care, ordinary friendship, and unsafe authority.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: The model assumes relational custody relieves the wounded self. In OCD, another person can become part of the compulsion. In abusive or high-control settings, another person can become an unsafe authority. In valid solitude, self-trust may be safer than handing interpretation away.

claim_units: Unusual quiet, blank, or absorbed states can become harmful when appropriated as worth verdicts.
A solo correction-audit can reproduce the wound of solo adjudication.
The proposed safe default is a twenty-four-hour identity-verdict moratorium plus one ordinary act of care.
Classification of the state, practice type, evidence, or scope should be relationally held by a trusted other.
The model keeps return discipline and scope gating, but moves adjudication custody outside the wounded self.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Clinical decision support, education, software review, and organizational postmortems after ambiguous signals
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: High-perfectionism students, clinicians, researchers, or engineers given a no-identity-verdict rule plus one concrete prosocial or repair action and bounded review will show less rumination, fewer defensive interpretations, and faster useful action than those asked to self-audit the meaning of the ambiguous event.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: When a person is vulnerable to self-worth verdicts, making them classify the meaning of an ambiguous signal can amplify the wound. A bounded second-person or rule-held review plus one concrete repair action should outperform solo meta-analysis.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Ordinary supervision, rest, generic reflection, or standard review explains all improvement, or the second-person route increases dependency, reassurance seeking, delay, or approval hunger.

exact_claim: After an unusual quiet, blank, or absorbed state, the dangerous act for achievement-contingent, scrupulous, lonely, or over-adjudicating practitioners is not only claiming the state as a verdict, but also self-administering the audit that is supposed to prevent the verdict. For this cohort, the default should be no self or worth claim for twenty-four hours plus one ordinary act of care. Any classification of the state, practice type, evidence, or scope gate should be held by a trusted second person, teacher, peer, or clinician, not by the wounded self alone.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Participants assigned to solo correction-checks report more worry about whether they did the check correctly than those assigned to no-verdict plus one ordinary act of care.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: For high achievement-contingent but non-clinical overinterpreters, solo audit increases meta-checking compared with a non-adjudicating default.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Four-arm pilot after quiet-state practice: solo return check, no-verdict plus ordinary care, ordinary rest or conversation, and helper-held routing.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Solo audit produces equal or lower rumination, shame, and meta-checking than the no-verdict or helper-held arms.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A helper protocol that refuses repeated certainty-seeking and returns the person to ordinary conduct reduces rumination more than unstructured reassurance.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Relational custody helps only when it is bounded and non-reassuring.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Stratified pilot measuring reassurance seeking, intolerance of uncertainty, dependency, shame, and completed ordinary action.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Repeated helper reassurance performs as well as bounded custody, or bounded custody increases dependency and anxiety.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Participants asked to classify whether a practice was instrumental, autotelic, devotional, or non-result show more state-classification loops than those given a universal no-verdict default.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The scope-gate decision itself becomes compulsive in the target cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Experimental comparison of classification-first instructions against universal no-verdict instructions.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Classification improves clarity without increasing rumination, or performs better than the no-verdict default.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: The protocol helps lonely or achievement-contingent over-reflectors most, has little effect for ordinary practitioners, and requires exclusion or clinical routing for OCD, scrupulosity, mania, dissociation, severe depression, trauma activation, addiction withdrawal, or unsafe authority contexts.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Human-condition benefit is narrow and state-dependent.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Two-week screened pilot using measures of contingencies of self-worth, loneliness, intolerance of uncertainty, rumination, scrupulosity, dependency, and adverse meditation effects.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Effects are not moderated by self-worth contingency, loneliness, or scrupulosity risk, or adverse effects cluster in the intended cohort.

near_neighbors.overlap: Supports the modern wound: rising perfectionism, contingent worth pressure, and social isolation make private self-verdict loops more plausible.
near_neighbors.source: Curran and Hill, Perfectionism Is Increasing Over Time, https://rorybatchilder.com/files/pubs/journals/releases/bul-bul0000138.pdf; U.S. Surgeon General loneliness advisory, https://www.hhs.gov/sites/default/files/surgeon-general-social-connection-advisory.pdf

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Merge or cross-index with Who Holds The Gate, Not Every Check Should Be Yours, No Silence Proves Itself, Not Every Practice Is a Tool, and Keep What Can Correct You.
Rename the contribution as a bounded safety-routing refinement: relational custody for unsafe meta-adjudication.

Build a codebook with fields for current risk state, self-verdict risk, meta-checking risk, helper availability, unsafe helper risk, reassurance-seeking risk, no-verdict default, ordinary act of care, clinical exclusion, evidence passage, warning, and repair.
Use split-source coding. Do not let one source both establish relational custody and confirm the predicted warning or repair.

Run the proposed four-arm pilot, but add an ERP-informed anti-reassurance condition and explicit stop rules for OCD, scrupulosity, dependency, shame, dissociation, mania, severe depression, trauma activation, addiction withdrawal, unsafe authority, and medical concern.
Design a low-barrier relational option for isolated participants, then test whether it helps without becoming dependency or reassurance outsourcing.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.50 to 0.22. The strongest element is the safety interaction claim that self-issued meta-adjudication can be the compulsion and should not be self-held for a narrow cohort. But that structure is already present in prior Lumenary records, especially Who Holds The Gate and Not Every Check Should Be Yours, and has close external neighbors in Ignatian discernment, scrupulosity and OCD treatment, meditation-challenge support routing, and Buddhist anti-ownership practice. Human-condition fit is plausible for stable lonely, perfectionistic, achievement-contingent overinterpreters with safe relational access. It is not fit for active OCD or scrupulosity reassurance loops, dissociation, mania, psychosis, severe depression, trauma activation, addiction withdrawal, medical blackout concerns, coercive authority contexts, or people whose real need is ordinary solitude, rest, or professional care.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is standard spiritual direction, ERP anti-reassurance work, meditation-safety triage, sponsorship, or pastoral care, and that the wording adds no new prediction or screening rule.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can name cases where the meta-audit itself was the compulsion and agree that a universal no-verdict default plus bounded relational custody changes routing, reduces self-checking, and prevents both overclaiming and overmanagement.
questions: When a student or client has an unusual quiet state, do you already forbid self-verdicts and route interpretation through ordinary conduct or a bounded second person?
Does the proposed helper role reduce checking, or does it become reassurance seeking by another route?
What concrete cases show that solo correction-checks made a person worse?
What concrete cases show that second-person correction created dependency, shame, or abuse risk?
Would the twenty-four-hour no-verdict plus one act of care instruction change what you actually recommend?

SN 22.95 Foam and MN 44 Cula-vedalla, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_95.html and https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN44.html
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Relational custody can become dependency, reassurance seeking, authority appeasement, or spiritual abuse. The twenty-four-hour rule is plausible but arbitrary. The helper requirement may fail the loneliest people, and valid solitude can be pathologized if the model assumes every serious audit needs another person.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before publication, read full work on scrupulosity, OCD reassurance seeking, family or clergy accommodation, intolerance of uncertainty, spiritual direction ethics, VCE meditation-related challenges, achievement-contingent self-worth, perfectionism, behavioral activation, and spiritual abuse. The strongest source gap is whether bounded relational custody can be separated empirically from reassurance accommodation.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Ignatian discernment is the closest primary structural neighbor. Rule 8 already separates a powerful interior consolation from later resolutions and opinions, requiring careful examination before credit or action. The Annotations give the director a real routing role while also limiting overdirection. SN 22.95 refuses to turn consciousness into substance or self-proof, and MN 44 treats cessation and self-identification through training, sequence, and path rather than private-state authority. The candidate's cohort language is modern, but delay, return, and guided discernment are old structures.

title: The Audit You Cannot Hold Alone
unlike_statement: Unlike Ignatian discernment, OCD and scrupulosity treatment, VCE support routing, and prior Lumenary gate-holder records, this idea says the audit decision itself can be unsafe for lonely or achievement-contingent over-adjudicators, so the first move is no self-verdict plus ordinary care, with classification held relationally. That is a useful safety refinement, but mostly renamed prior art.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: A formal active-inference account that represents non-inferred self-luminous awareness without reducing it to a hidden state, prior, precision parameter, global workspace, or reportable phenomenological content.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence from strong to moderate. The audit supports vocabulary bias and level mismatch, but not the stronger claim that no possible non-reductive formalization can exist.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If such a model works and is accepted by both active-inference theorists and Advaita scholars, the claim that predictive processing structurally cannot express svaprakasha becomes too strong. A second anomaly would be Advaita practitioners finding the predictive-processing explanation more faithful to witness recognition than Buddhist practitioners do.

claim_units: Predictive processing is not neutral between atman and anatta.
Self as relaxable generative posit aligns structurally with Buddhist not-self or no-self framings.
The framework cannot represent Advaita svaprakasha as non-inferred self-disclosure without changing the claim into a model, prior, state, or latent cause.
The Free Energy Principle often speaks at a subpersonal or deflationary as-if level, while the religious dispute concerns person-level warrant.
The frontier should be retired as a formal reproduction claim and retained only as a one-sided scientific redescription plus translation-strain warning.

Human-condition fit is narrow: it helps stable practitioners avoid letting neuroscience settle identity after quiet states, but it does not directly address addiction, grief, severe anxiety, or loneliness except through overinterpretation and meaning loss.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Patients taught pain as predictive construction will benefit most when the explanation is paired with language that their pain is real and morally non-discrediting. Without that split, a subgroup will feel invalidated and show lower adherence.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A mechanistic model that defines an experience as constructed, predicted, or inferred will be heard as an ontological verdict unless explicitly separated from person-level meaning and warrant.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Constructed-pain education is equally acceptable and effective without any mechanism-versus-verdict distinction, including among patients worried about being disbelieved.

exact_claim: Predictive-processing accounts of contemplative self-negation do not neutrally reproduce the atman versus anatta dispute. By treating the self as an inferred or constructed model whose precision can be relaxed, they already favor the not-self side and cannot express Advaita self-luminous awareness without reducing it to a model. The apparent convergence is translation strain across both vocabulary and explanatory level.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A coded literature sample will use terms such as self-model, construction, inference, prediction, precision, and attenuation more often than terms that preserve non-inferred witnessing, and Advaita-compatible accounts will require added philosophical caveats.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Predictive-processing meditation papers carry a structural no-self bias when they discuss self-negation.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Systematic review and codebook applied to predictive-processing, active-inference, and contemplative-science papers from 2010 to 2026.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: A balanced sample represents self-luminous awareness without extra caveats or reduction to model terms, and authors explicitly distinguish mechanism from metaphysical verdict.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable meditators given a predictive-processing explanation after an objectless or quiet-state vignette will more often infer no-self, constructed self, or deflationary conclusions than those given a neutral phenomenological explanation.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The vocabulary itself steers interpretation after quiet states.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized vignette study with secular mindfulness, Theravada, Advaita, and nondual practitioners.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Participants split evenly between Advaita witness and Buddhist no-self interpretations, or the predictive-processing frame does not shift interpretation relative to neutral language.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Active-inference modelers asked to formalize Shankara's witness will either treat it as outside model scope or convert it into a state, prior, or inference-like construct.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The FEP level mismatch matters.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Expert elicitation with active-inference scientists, philosophers of mind, and Advaita scholars.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Multiple modelers independently produce a coherent formal account that Advaita scholars judge non-reductive and that does not add metaphysics outside FEP.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable practitioners high in neuroscience-mediated overinterpretation report lower identity distress and less nihilistic or inflationary conclusion-making after a mechanism-versus-verdict exercise than after a self-is-a-model explanation alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Separating mechanism from verdict helps the modern target cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small screened pilot after meditation-app or retreat-related quiet-state reports.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The exercise increases rumination or performs no better than rest, conversation, or a generic grounding prompt.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a discovery. Publish, if at all, as a bounded critique of predictive-processing translation strain.

Pilot Separate the Mechanism From the Verdict only with stable adults and stop for depersonalization, derealization, psychosis, mania, panic, trauma activation, OCD or scrupulosity, and medical blackout concerns.
For human-condition fit, keep the target wound narrow: neuroscience-mediated meaning loss, identity distress, and overinterpretation after quiet states.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.55 to 0.38. The exact Lumenary frontier correction is useful, but the structural materials are well known: predictive self-modeling leans constructivist or no-self, FEP has deflationary and explanatory-level critiques, and Advaita self-luminosity is already defined against objectification and inference. Publishability should stay modest until the claim is framed as a bounded translation-strain warning for stable practitioners with meaning-loss or identity-distress after quiet states, not as a broad science-versus-spirituality verdict.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners and scientists say the distinction is already standard: mechanisms do not adjudicate metaphysics, self-model language is explicitly naturalistic, and competent teachers already prevent students from turning neuroscience into a self-verdict.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Advaita teachers say predictive-processing explanations regularly distort witness teaching, Buddhist teachers say the vocabulary fits not-self practice more naturally, and contemplative scientists agree that the mechanism-versus-verdict split changes consent language, study design, or post-retreat integration.

primary_pair: Shankara, Adhyasa Bhashya and Brahma Sutra Bhashya witness/self-illumination passages, with SEP overview, https://sanskritdocuments.org/sites/snsastri/adhyasabhashya.pdf and https://plato.stanford.edu/archives/sum2022/entries/shankara/
SN 22.59 Anattalakkhana Sutta and Udana 1.10 Bahiya Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html and https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/KN/Ud/ud1_10.html
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Laukkonen and Slagter do not claim to adjudicate Advaita versus Buddhism, and FEP theorists can say the model is only a heuristic or mathematical description. The phrase took a side may confuse a modeling assumption with a metaphysical conclusion. It is safer to say the vocabulary has a Buddhist-compatible affordance and an Advaita distortion risk.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before raising novelty, search the exact target in Metzinger self-model theory, Letheby and Gerrans on predictive self-binding, Seth on self as controlled hallucination, Sebastian and Limanowski on predictive selfhood, Mann's Free Energy user guide, Bruineberg and Rietveld, Hohwy, Thompson, Albahari, Fasching, Ram-Prasad, and recent mindfulness no-self mechanism critiques such as https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11097-025-10081-8.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Shankara's side treats consciousness as the presupposed, self-disclosing condition of knowing, not as an object found inside cognition. SN 22.59 places consciousness among the aggregates to be regarded as not-self, and Bahiya removes any authorized claimant in the seen, heard, sensed, or cognized. Laukkonen and Slagter's predictive account, https://researchportal.scu.edu.au/esploro/outputs/journalArticle/From-many-to-none-Meditation-and/991013062213702368, directly models the Buddhist operation by describing meditation as deconstructing predictions, including the predicted self. It can model Advaita only by translating the witness into a prior, latent state, fixed point, or reportable pure-awareness condition, which is not Shankara's non-objectifiable self-luminosity.

title: The Brain Model Already Took a Side
unlike_statement: Unlike Laukkonen and Slagter, Metzinger-style self-model theory, and general FEP critiques, this idea specifically says that a predictive-processing model of self-negation cannot be a neutral higher-order mirror of the atman and anatta dispute because its self-as-model vocabulary already rules out Shankara's non-inferred witness unless extra metaphysical assumptions are added. That is an extension, not a discovery.

anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Mature direct-recognition or clear-light practitioners inside competent lineages, and active OCD or scrupulosity cases at the clinical boundary.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers novelty and publishability. The model remains plausible only as a narrow safety-routing protocol for stable, non-clinical overinterpreters with adequate ordinary support.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If mature practitioners reliably benefit from immediate teacher-framed recognition, the no-verdict rule is too broad. If high-checking practitioners turn the no-verdict sentence, the twenty-four-hour clock, or the care act into a ritual, the practice harms the very cohort it targets. Unsafe teachers or communities can also turn delayed interpretation into control.

claim_units: Silence or blankness is not evidence by itself for self, no-self, attainment, failure, superiority, disappearance, or worth.
The first rule is no identity verdict for twenty-four hours.
The next move is one concrete act of care, relation, duty, or ordinary steadiness.
Classification and correction gates are second-step tools, because for the target cohort classification itself can become a self-test.
The Self versus not-self dispute still matters, but its first modern use is protective rather than metaphysical.
Human-condition fit is clear but narrow: loneliness, unsupported interpretation, anxiety after gaps, meaning loss, and achievement-contingent self-worth.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Writers, researchers, or founders high in contingent self-worth will complete more useful next actions and show less rumination after a no-verdict plus small-care or small-duty protocol than after a meaning-of-the-state journaling prompt.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: After a blank, flow state, failed session, or sudden clarity, the dangerous move for achievement-bound people is treating the state as a verdict on talent, worth, or calling. A no-verdict return to one useful action should outperform self-diagnostic reflection for overinterpreters.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Meaning-of-the-state journaling improves completion and reduces rumination more than no-verdict action, or the no-verdict rule causes avoidance of necessary review.

exact_claim: A quiet, blank, or objectless state should not be treated as a judge of self, no-self, attainment, failure, or worth. For lonely, stressed, achievement-bound, or unsupported practitioners, the first move should be no identity verdict, one ordinary act of care, and delayed interpretation through trustworthy support or visible conduct.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: No-verdict plus one act of care produces fewer identity verdicts, less rumination, less shame, and more completed ordinary action than a classification-first audit.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: For high achievement-contingent solo practitioners, classification itself becomes a self-test.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Four-arm pilot after quiet-state practice: no-verdict care, classification audit, rest or conversation, and helper-held routing.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Classification-first instructions, ordinary rest, or ordinary conversation perform as well or better without increasing checking or shame.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In coded meditation-challenge reports, appraisal, social context, teacher or clinician support, and return behavior explain distress or benefit better than quiet-state description alone.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: State phenomenology alone does not determine outcome.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: VCE-style interview coding with held-out outcome ratings and inter-rater reliability.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Outcomes are predicted almost entirely by phenomenology, with little added value from interpretation, support, or return behavior.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Effects are strongest for stable lonely, unsupported, perfectionistic, or achievement-contingent overinterpreters and weak or harmful for active OCD, scrupulosity, dissociation, mania, trauma activation, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, or unsafe-authority contexts.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The practice is cohort-specific.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Screened two-week pilot with loneliness, contingencies of self-worth, rumination, intolerance of uncertainty, scrupulosity, and adverse meditation-effect measures.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Benefits are not moderated by self-worth contingency, loneliness, rumination, or checking risk, or adverse effects cluster in the intended cohort.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Participants who complete the ordinary act within one hour show larger reductions in verdict urgency and isolation than those who only write the no-verdict sentence.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The care act is not decorative, it is the active return mechanism.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Component trial comparing no-verdict only, care act only, no-verdict plus care, and generic journaling.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The care act adds no effect, or becomes avoidance of needed interpretation, repair, or clinical care.

Use split-source coding. Do not let one passage or practitioner report both establish the post-gap claim and confirm the predicted repair.

Run the four-arm pilot only with safety screens for OCD, scrupulosity, panic, dissociation, trauma activation, severe depression, mania, psychosis, addiction withdrawal, medical blackout, unsafe authority, and coercive workload.
Add a direct-recognition anomaly set before public use: Advaita, Dzogchen, Mahamudra, clear-light sleep, and competent teacher-held recognition.

For human-condition fit, state the cohort and non-fit cases plainly. This serves loneliness, unsupported interpretation, anxiety after gaps, meaning loss, and achievement-contingent self-worth, not all silence or all practice.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.31 to 0.18. The practical sentence is clear and potentially useful, but it almost exactly consolidates recent Lumenary records and has close external neighbors in Ignatian discernment, VCE support routing, Buddhist not-self practice, ACT defusion and committed action, behavioral activation, and ERP warnings about reassurance. Human-condition fit is stronger than originality: the target is stable lonely or achievement-contingent overinterpreters, not people in acute clinical, spiritual-abuse, medical, or lineage-bound contexts.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is already standard guidance: do not trust peaks, test by conduct, avoid premature attainment claims, use discernment, return to values, and route risk to a teacher or clinician.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners can name cases where the classification gate itself intensified shame or self-worth checking, and where the no-verdict care-first rule changed routing better than ordinary discernment or generic grounding.
questions: Do you already tell students not to make identity or attainment verdicts from quiet states?
Does no-verdict plus one act of care change your guidance, or is it standard discernment, grounding, ACT, or behavioral activation?
When does classification help, and when does it become the wound?
What concrete cases show immediate recognition was appropriate rather than delayed?
What concrete cases show no-verdict, delayed interpretation, or helper-held support became avoidance, reassurance seeking, dependency, or abuse?
relevant_practitioners: Ignatian spiritual directors
Buddhist meditation teachers familiar with not-self and unusual states
Advaita, Dzogchen, Mahamudra, and sleep-yoga teachers
ERP clinicians treating OCD and scrupulosity
Clinicians familiar with meditation-related challenges
ACT and rumination-focused CBT practitioners
Spiritual-abuse advocates and chaplains

primary_pair: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.7.23, unseen seer and unknown knower, https://www.brhat.in/openlibrary/special/brihadaranyaka-upanishad/3-7-23
SN 22.59 and SN 22.95, consciousness as not-self and foam-like, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html and https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_95.html
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: Very high if generalized. Advaita, Dzogchen, Mahamudra, clear-light sleep, and direct-recognition lineages may treat some quiet or objectless reports as trainable evidence within strict contexts. In OCD, scrupulosity, trauma, dissociation, mania, severe depression, and unsafe authority settings, the instruction can become avoidance, checking, reassurance outsourcing, or control.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before publication, read Ignatian spiritual-direction ethics, VCE and Cheetah House materials, OCD and scrupulosity reassurance-seeking literature, ACT defusion and committed action, rumination stop-rule research, behavioral activation, achievement-contingent self-worth, perfectionism, spiritual bypassing, and spiritual-abuse literature. The largest empirical gap is whether no-verdict plus ordinary care beats classification-first, rest, conversation, and clinician-guided routing.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 protects a hidden seer and knower as the inner ruler, while SN 22.59 and SN 22.95 refuse to let consciousness become self or substance. These primary texts do not let silence neutrally judge the question, they assign incompatible post-gap grammars. Ignatius adds the closest practice structure: interior states and the judgments following them are delayed, tested, disclosed, or examined before credit, especially in the rules on desolation and consolation without cause, https://www.ccel.org/ccel/ignatius/exercises.all.html. The candidate's practical move is not a new metaphysics. It is a triage rule that says the first response to quiet should be ordinary care, not verdict-making.

title: Stop Making Silence Judge You
unlike_statement: Unlike Ignatian discernment, VCE support routing, ACT defusion, ERP anti-reassurance, Buddhist not-self strategy, and prior Lumenary correction-holder records, this idea says the first move after silence for a specific wounded cohort should be no verdict plus one ordinary act of care before any classification. That is a useful condensation, but it is mostly renamed prior work.
